title: SMART CLINIC CHAIR WITH PATIENT USING VI
Creative Strategist for Meta Ads (Beauty & E-commerce)
description:
Do you want to be a part of our team’s growth journey? Send us a message!



About Our 5+ Year Old Company

We are not like most companies. We focus heavily on video advertisement, and that’s why 70% out of the 20 employees in the company work solely with either scriptwriting, image ads or video ads. In this in-house position, you’ll be a part of a team that is obsessed with telling stories that drive real results. As the competition in the e-commerce beauty industry is hard.



Role Overview

You will own creative strategy end-to-end: from customer research and persona development, to script writing, to iterating based on performance data. You'll work closely with the video editing team to make sure your scripts turn into converting videos.



Your Responsibilities

Research, build and document the customer personas (pain points and so on)

Identify winning advertisements from competitors and turn them into our videos

Write converting video scripts that utilizes a wide range of formats and trends

Analyze the performance of the videos, iterate into new videos and best practices

Document the winning findings, update our knowledge base and pivot the direction



The Requirements

5 years of experience within copywriting, creative strategist role or similar

Proven experience working as the the Creative Strategist in e-commerce

Willingness to learn new skills, take courses, utilize new tools and also AI



As A Person You Are

You are creative and optimistic

You are reliable and accountable

You are detail-oriented & perfectionist



What We Offer The Right Person

A long-term remote position with a stable company (5+ years)

Good environment with experienced video editors & copywriter

Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling e-commerce brand



What We Expect In Return

Delivery high-quality video scripts reliable every week

Full-time commitment (40 hours/week, Monday–Friday)

Drive to learn, openness for feedback and team spirit



Did you get excited when you read this? Then send us a message and we’ll get back to you!

title: Google Ads Account Manager (MCC)
description:
Google Ads Account Manager (MCC)



Full-Time | Remote



We are seeking an experienced Google Ads Account Manager to manage multiple client accounts using Google Ads MCC (My Client Center). This role focuses on optimizing campaigns, improving performance, and providing actionable insights to clients.



Key Responsibilities



Manage multiple Google Ads accounts through MCC



Plan, launch, and optimize campaigns across Search, Display, YouTube, and Performance Max



Conduct keyword, audience, and competitor research to improve campaign performance



Monitor KPIs such as CPA, CTR, ROAS, and CPC and implement optimization strategies



Collaborate with internal teams to develop ad creatives and messaging strategies



Maintain accurate tracking with Google Analytics, Tag Manager, and conversion tracking



Prepare regular reports with clear insights and recommendations



Stay updated on platform updates, best practices, and industry trends



Requirements



2+ years of experience managing Google Ads campaigns



Hands-on experience with Google Ads MCC



Strong analytical and problem-solving skills



Knowledge of tracking tools and reporting dashboards



Ability to manage multiple accounts and meet deadlines



Excellent communication and client-facing skills



Preferred Qualifications



Google Ads certification



Experience managing larger budgets or multiple clients



Knowledge of lead generation or eCommerce campaigns



Familiarity with remarketing strategies and A/B testing



What We Offer



Competitive salary based on experience



Opportunity to manage a diverse client portfolio



Supportive and collaborative work environment



Ongoing professional development and learning opportunities



Please submit your CV and relevant work examples demonstrating your Google Ads experience.

title: eCommerce Growth Assistant (Amazon PPC + Instagram + AI-Driven Execution)

title: Lead Data Analyst, Returns and Credits
description:
We are looking for a highly technical and analytical Lead Analyst to own the data integrity of our returns and credits department. Your primary goal is ensuring that our refunds and credits are reported accurately, formatted correctly, and tracked meticulously.



Key Responsibilities:



Data Integrity & Auditing: Monitor the full lifecycle of refunds and credits. Ensure all data is updated, formatted correctly, and reported without errors.



SLA Tracking & Vendor Accountability: Build and maintain tracking systems for vendor performance. You will ensure we know exactly which refunds, credits, and returns are on time and which are pending.



Workflow Assignment: Generate daily reports that serve as the "action plan" for the Returns Coordinator and Credits Coordinator. You will assign specific tasks to them to clear backlogs and fix discrepancies.



Scripting & Automation: Utilize scripts (Python, VBA, or AI-generated code) to clean messy data, run complex audits, and automate manual reporting processes.



Financial Reconciliation: Work with accounting values to ensure that what is in our system matches the financial reality of our bank/credit memos.



The Ideal Candidate:



Analytical & Technical: You spend 95% of your time in the data. You are an expert in Excel and comfortable using scripts to manipulate large datasets.



Detail-Obsessed: You spot formatting errors and missing values immediately.



Directive: You are comfortable handing off work to tea
mbers and following up to ensure it was done correctly.



Resourceful: You know how to use tools (including AI) to write the scripts or formulas needed to get the job done efficiently.



Requirements:



High-level proficiency in Excel (complex formulas, PivotTables, VBA/Macros).



Experience with scripting/automation (using Python, SQL, or similar to process data). Using AI to create scripts is acceptable. We DO NOT expect this individual to know how to code, or create scripts on their own, however to leverage AI and understand the tools to run it.



Background in working with financial data, accounting values, or inventory reconciliation.



Proven ability to organize workflows and track SLAs.



Send in you CV or a link to a shared file with necessary access granted. No CV will be automatically ignored.

title: Senior Manager - E-Commerce (with leadership exp)
description:
Description

We are hiring a senior E-commerce Manager to own and manage the majority of our digital business. This role is ideal for someone with a strong small business background who is comfortable leading a lean team, managing day to day operations, and stepping into the details when needed.



This is a hands on leadership role. We are not looking for a high level executive who operates far from execution. We are looking for someone who can lead, manage, and do..



Company Brief:

We are supporting a privately owned company that distributes marine dock parts and supplies, with a strong and growing e-commerce operation in Florida. The business serves both B2B and B2C customers and relies heavily on its digital channels to drive sales, support customer experience, and scale efficiently across domestic and international markets.



Responsibilities

Owning the end to end e-commerce operation across Shopify as the primary platform

Managing and supporting the back office and digital team

Overseeing technical, operational, and day to day e-commerce activities

Acting as the main point of contact for agencies and third party vendors

Representing the company on technical, operational, and integration related calls

Managing product additions, integrations, customer service escalations, and platform issues

Ensuring the team is aligned, productive, and clear on priorities

Running regular check ins and one on ones with direct reports

Coordinating with in person staff as it relates to e-commerce operations

Communicating clearly with company owners on progress, issues, and priorities

Getting hands on when needed to resolve issues or unblock the team



Platforms and Experience Required

Strong expertise in Shopify is required

Experience with Amazon is strongly preferred

Exposure to Walmart or eBay is a plus but not required

Comfort managing integrations, apps, and technical workflows

Experience working with agencies and external partners



Requirements



Education & Experience



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, E-commerce, or a related field is preferred

Minimum of 3 years of hands-on Shopify experience in a live e-commerce environment

Proven experience maintaining, optimizing, and troubleshooting Shopify stores

Experience managing or supporting marketplace platforms such as Amazon, Etsy, eBay and More

Background working in product-based or multi-channel e-commerce businesses

Strong understanding of end-to-end e-commerce operations and workflows

Comfortable working remotely and independently with minimal supervision

Able to manage day-to-day execution while overseeing team output and priorities

Ability to work fully during Eastern Standard Time business hours



Nice to Have Skills



Experience with additional marketplaces such as Walmart or other third-party platforms

Familiarity with e-commerce integrations, apps, and third-party tools

Basic understanding of e-commerce financials, including margins, pricing, and cost of goods

Experience coordinating with agencies or external vendors

Exposure to international e-commerce operations or cross-border selling

Comfortable supporting or overseeing digital marketing initiatives in partnership with specialists or agencies

Experience helping scale or integrate new brands or acquisitions into an existing e-commerce platform



Ideal Candidate Profile



Has managed a small to mid sized team (roughly 5–20 people)

Comes from a small business or growing company environment

Is comfortable wearing multiple hats

Can lead without being “too high level”

Is not afraid to get into the operational or technical details

Can grow with the company as we scale and potentially acquire other businesses



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: Video Editor for Ecommerce Ad Creatives
description:
About Us



We run multiple e-commerce brands selling physical products through Meta 
/Instagram) ads. Our business is built on high-converting video ad creatives — and we need a skilled video editor to become a core part of our creative team.



This is not a one-off project. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term, take ownership of the creative output, and eventually become our go-to person for all things video.



What You'll Be Doing



- Edit video ads (1–5 minutes) optimized for Meta platforms 
, Instagram, Reels)

- Create multiple hook variations for each ad concept (different openings, different angles)

- Source and curate stock footage, UGC clips, and B-roll to build compelling ad creatives

- Add text overlays, captions, transitions, sound design, and music to maximize engagement and watch time

- Adapt and localize winning international ad creatives for our target market

- Work from scripts and briefs we provide — but also bring your own creative eye and suggestions

- Deliver fast turnarounds with clean, organized project files



Requirements



Must Have



- Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro or CapCut (or both)

- Strong understanding of video ad pacing, hooks, and retention techniques

- Experience editing direct-response or e-commerce video ads (not just vlogs or YouTube content)

- Ability to source and work with stock footage, UGC content, and product clips

- Good eye for typography, color grading, and visual hierarchy in ad creatives

- Reliable internet connection and able to work during overlapping business hours

- Strong communication skills — you ask questions when the brief is unclear, not after delivery



 Nice to Have



- Experience with After Effects for motion graphics and animated text

- Familiarity with what makes ads perform on Meta (thumb-stop rate, hold rate, CTR)

- Experience working with product-based businesses or dropshipping/e-commerce brands

- Ability to create simple product mockups or lifestyle composites



Why Work With Us



- Stable, long-term position — not a one-time gig

- Clear feedback loop: you deliver ? we give feedback ? you improve ? repeat until we're fully aligned

- Room to grow into a lead creative role as we scale

- Performance bonuses for ads that scale well (we reward results, not just hours)

- We respect your craft — you may know more than us about certain things and we're happy to learn from you too

- We pay properly and on time, every time



 How to Apply — Paid Test Task



**Important:** Do NOT just send your resume. We use a short paid test task to find the right person. Here's how it works:



1. We'll send you a product and a script for a 1–2 minute video ad

2. You'll create 1–2 edited versions of the video, each with 3 different hooks (openings)

3. We provide the script only — you source the footage, choose the music, handle the pacing and editing

4. We'll evaluate: edit quality, pacing, content sourcing, creativity, turnaround time, and how well you follow the brief

5. You'll be paid for the test task regardless of the outcome



This tells us more than any portfolio ever could. We want to see how you work, how you think, and how fast you move — not just your highlight reel.



To Apply, Please Include:



- A short introduction about yourself and your experience with video editing for ads

- Links to 2–3 examples of video ads you've edited (e-commerce preferred, but any direct-response work is fine)

- Your editing software of choice

- Your availability (hours per day / timezone)

- Confirm that you're ready to complete the paid test task





*We're not looking for perfection on day one. We're looking for someone who cares about the craft, takes feedback well, and wants to get better every single week. If that's you, apply now.*

title: Onboarding /ops assistant

What You’ll Do

Admin & Coordination

General Support

Requirements

How to Apply



Send the below to 



- Your resume

- A short note on why you’re applying or your relevant experience

- Your current location (Davao)

title: AI SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist (Construction Industry) – Remote
description:
Company Overview

We are a fast-growing company in the commercial construction materials industry specializing in insulated metal panel (IMP) systems used in cold storage, warehouses, food processing facilities, and industrial buildings. Our goal is to become the most authoritative online resource in the industry by building a high-traffic website that attracts architects, engineers, contractors, and developers searching for technical construction solutions.



We are seeking a highly capable AI-driven SEO and digital marketing specialist to lead our content and traffic growth initiatives. This role will leverage modern AI tools and SEO platforms to publish high-quality technical content, grow organic traffic, and generate inbound project leads.



Position Summary



The AI SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist will be responsible for developing and executing a digital marketing strategy focused on search engine optimization, AI-assisted content creation, and competitor analysis within the commercial construction industry.



This position will focus on creating technical content that ranks on Google and attracts professionals involved in construction projects such as architects, engineers, developers, and general contractors.



Key Responsibilities: 





SEO Strategy



Conduct keyword research focused on commercial construction, industrial buildings, and insulated metal panels.



Identify high-value search opportunities related to cold storage, building envelopes, wall systems, and construction materials.



Develop SEO strategies to increase organic traffic and domain authority.





Content Development



Produce and publish 4–6 technical articles per week using AI-assisted content tools.



Write and edit long-form blog articles (1,500–3,000+ words) covering engineering, installation, cost comparisons, and industry trends.



Create pillar pages and technical guides designed to rank for competitive construction-related keywords.





Competitor Analysis



Analyze competitor websites to identify high-performing content and keywords.



Monitor search rankings and identify opportunities to outperform competitors.





AI Content Workflow



Use AI tools to generate article drafts and marketing assets.



Edit and optimize AI-generated content for clarity, technical accuracy, and SEO performance.



Repurpose blog content into LinkedIn posts and marketing
s.





Website Management



Publish and optimize content within GoDaddy, WordPress or similar CMS platforms.



Improve on-page SEO including meta tags, internal linking, headings, and keyword placement.



Ensure content follows SEO best practices and technical formatting standards.





Lead Generation



Implement lead capture strategies such as downloadable guides, spec sheets, and calculators.



Track lead generation performance and optimize conversion rates.





Analytics & Reporting



Monitor website traffic, keyword rankings, and conversion metrics.



Provide weekly or monthly performance reports and recommendations.



Required Skills and Experience





SEO & Digital Marketing



Proven experience with search engine optimization (SEO)



Experience growing organic website traffic through content marketing





Familiarity with SEO platforms such as:



SEMrush



Ahrefs



Google Search Console



Google Analytics





AI Marketing Tools



Experience using AI tools for marketing and content production such as:



ChatGPT or similar AI writing tools



Jasper or AI content generation platforms



AI-assisted SEO tools



Content Writing



Ability to write clear and engaging technical content



Experience writing for B2B industries such as construction, engineering, manufacturing, or industrial products



Strong English writing and editing skills



Website Platforms

Experience managing or publishing content in:



WordPress



HubSpot CMS



Webflow or similar platforms



Research Skills



Ability to research technical topics related to construction, building systems, or industrial materials



Ability to translate complex technical information into clear educational content



Preferred Qualifications



Experience working in the construction, architecture, engineering, or building materials industry not necessary but a plus



Familiarity with commercial construction terminology



Experience creating technical guides, specification documents, or engineering content



Experience with B2B lead generation marketing



Experience managing LinkedIn content for professional audiences





Tools Used in This Role



The candidate should be comfortable using or learning tools such as:



SEO platforms (SEMrush, Ahrefs)



AI writing tools



Content management systems (WordPress)



CRM platforms (HubSpot or Pipedrive)



Analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console)





Work Schedule



Fully remote position



Flexible schedule



Expected workload: approximately 30–40 hours per week





Performance Metrics



Success in this role will be measured by:



Growth in organic website traffic



Number of published articles



Keyword ranking improvements



Lead generation from website traffic





Compensation



Compensation will be based on experience and performance. We are open to candidates from multiple regions and offer competitive rates for highly skilled SEO and AI marketing professionals.



How to Apply



Please submit:



Resume or CV



Examples of SEO articles or websites you have helped grow



Brief description of SEO tools and AI platforms you regularly use



Applicants with demonstrated success increasing organic traffic in technical or B2B industries will be strongly preferred.

title: Growth Marketing, SEO & AI Content Specialist
description:
- Job Overview



We are looking for a highly skilled, independent, fast-moving, and results-driven Growth Marketing, SEO & AI Content Specialist to support the growth of iSpeax Therapy and iSpeax Tech across content, SEO, website publishing, social media,
 marketing, lead generation, AI-assisted production, and campaign execution.



This is not a content posting role.



You will be expected to execute, move quickly, think strategically, produce high-quality work, track results, evaluate performance, and continuously improve outcomes. You must establish clear daily and weekly growth goals, execute against them, assess whether they were achieved, analyze why they were or were not met, and adjust strategy accordingly.



We are looking for someone proficient in growth marketing, SEO, content creation, research, AI, reporting, and digital execution in one pair of hands.



This role will begin part-time at 4 hours per day and may expand to 8 hours per day based on performance and business needs.



 - The Role



You will be responsible for planning, creating, publishing, optimizing, tracking, and improving marketing efforts across both brands.



This is a high-ownership role. You should be able to take a goal, turn it into a plan, execute quickly, measure outcomes, and improve performance over time without needing constant direction.



 - What You’ll Do: Growth Strategy & Execution



Establish clear daily, weekly, and monthly growth goals



Set and track KPIs for follower growth, engagement, website traffic,
 list growth, lead generation, and conversions



Develop and execute growth strategies



Build action plans around defined growth goals and move quickly on execution



Evaluate what is underperforming, what needs to change, and adjust strategy based on performance data



Create and maintain monthly strategy plans aligned with launches, campaigns, offers, and business priorities



Collaborate with founders and team members on campaign direction, priorities, and marketing initiatives



Content Creation & Publishing



Create, write, edit, schedule, and publish high-quality content across social media, blog, website, and
 channels



Write SEO-optimized blog articles



Upload, format, and publish content in Webflow



Repurpose long-form content into captions, reels, stories,
 copy, landing page copy, and short-form marketing assets



Maintain and manage a strategic content calendar



Ensure all content is polished, accurate, on-brand, and aligned with business goals



Support basic video editing for reels, short-form videos, and promotional content



Use AI tools to improve efficiency, ideation, content production, and workflow speed without sacrificing quality



SEO & Website Optimization



Develop and execute SEO-optimized content strategies



Conduct keyword research, topic research, competitor research, and search intent analysis



Optimize blog posts, web pages, landing pages, metadata, headings, internal links, alt text, and calls to action



Improve search visibility, organic traffic, and content discoverability



Support landing page optimization for stronger lead capture and conversion



Monitor SEO performance and identify opportunities for improvement



Social Media Growth & Community Management



Manage and grow social presence across Instagram, TikTok, and other relevant platforms



Focus on weekly follower growth



Create platform-specific content strategies to improve reach, engagement, and audience growth



Conduct hashtag research and social keyword research



Monitor trends, content opportunities, and platform changes



Engage with followers through comments, DMs, story replies, and community interaction



Test content hooks, formats, posting strategies, and engagement tactics to improve growth




 Marketing, Lead Magnets & Campaigns



Grow, organize, segment, and manage
 lists



Create and send newsletters, nurture
s, promotional
s, and marketing campaigns



Use Mailchimp or similar platforms to execute and optimize campaigns



Create lead magnets and list-building offers to support audience growth and lead generation



Build campaigns that support visibility, trust, engagement, and conversion



Monitor campaign performance, including opens, clicks, subscriber growth, and conversions



CRM, Lead Tracking & Reporting



Maintain CRM systems or lead tracking tools to track inquiries, leads, and campaign outcomes



Track where leads are coming from and which efforts are producing results



Provide weekly and monthly reporting on social growth, website traffic, SEO performance,
 performance, lead generation, and campaign results



Conduct performance benchmark assessments



Translate performance data into actionable recommendations and next steps



Help identify what should be improved, repeated, or replaced based on results



AI Tools, Research & Marketing Operations



Conduct research on competitors, trends, audience behavior, keywords, tools, and content opportunities



Stay current on social media trends, SEO best practices, AI workflows, and digital marketing changes



Use AI tools strategically for content ideation, drafting, workflow support, research, and production



Identify smarter systems and more efficient workflows to improve speed, quality, and output



 - Hard Requirements — Please Apply Only If You Meet These



Strong hands-on experience in growth marketing, SEO, content marketing,
 marketing, and social media marketing



Strong writing skills for blogs, captions, landing pages, and
 campaigns



Strong understanding of SEO optimization, including keyword research, on-page SEO, blog optimization, and content structure



Strong experience publishing and formatting content in Webflow



Strong experience with Instagram and TikTok marketing



Experience with Mailchimp or similar
 marketing platforms



Highly proficient in using tools such as Airtable, Webflow, ChatGPT, Google Cloud, Canva, Mailchimp or similar platforms, and AI video generation tools



Ability to create and manage a strategic content calendar



Experience with basic video editing



Experience creating lead magnets



Strong skills in competitor analysis, keyword research, and hashtag research



Experience using CRM or lead tracking systems



Able to work independently without constant supervision



Fast learner with strong judgment and problem-solving ability



Able to work quickly while maintaining high-quality output



Strong attention to detail and strong organizational skills



Must have a stable internet connection



Must be comfortable being on Zoom regularly with the team



 - Bonus If You Have



Experience in healthcare, therapy, education, parenting brands, or SaaS



Experience creating short-form educational or conversion-driven video content



Experience supporting founder-led brands or startup-style environments



Strong visual eye for branding, layout, and content presentation



Experience building AI-assisted workflows for content, research, and production



 - This Role Is Not for You If



You only know how to post content but not grow channels



You need constant daily instruction to complete tasks



You are not comfortable with KPIs, reporting, and performance analysis



You do not understand SEO beyond surface-level keywords



You are slow to learn new tools and systems



You cannot work quickly without sacrificing quality



You are more of a general assistant than a true marketer



You are not comfortable taking ownership of outcomes



You do not test, analyze, and improve based on performance data



 - How You’ll Work



You will work directly with the founders and team on priorities, campaigns, and business goals



You will be expected to take ownership of execution and performance



You will help establish growth goals, execute against them, and report on progress regularly



You will collaborate on Zoom frequently, so strong communication and a stable internet connection are required



We care about results, speed, quality, initiative, and accountability



 - Schedule & Growth Opportunity



Start at 4 hours per day. Opportunity to expand to 8 hours per day based on performance and business needs



This role begins part-time and may grow into a larger role for the right person



Performance Expectations



Performance will be evaluated based on:



Follower growth



Engagement growth



Blog publishing consistency



SEO improvement



Website traffic growth




 list growth



Lead generation



Campaign execution quality



Speed and efficiency



Reporting quality



Ability to identify weak points and improve results over time



 - Ideal Candidate



You are proactive, highly organized, strategic, fast, and execution-focused. You are comfortable wearing multiple hats and moving from idea to execution without unnecessary delays. You know how to evaluate performance, identify what needs improvement, and make smart adjustments quickly.



You are not just creative. You are accountable for growth.



 - How to Apply



Please submit the following:



In the first sentence of your application, include the word “essential.” Applications without this word will not be considered.



2 writing samples: 1 blog article and 1
 sample



2 content samples showing social media posts + 1 short-form video sample



1 example of results achieved, including the goal, what you did, and the outcome



A short list of the tools you have used directly and your level of proficiency, including platforms such as Airtable, Webflow, ChatGPT, Google Cloud, Canva, Mailchimp, AI video tools, CRM systems, or similar



A screenshot of your internet speed test



A brief note on your personal interests outside of work

title: Revenue Cycle Specialist
description:
At Premier Eye Associates, we don’t just see patients — we treat them like family. Our mission is to deliver world-class eye care with legendary service that feels like a five-star experience. We’re seeking a Revenue Cycle Manager who brings that same excellence and warmth to our business operations.



About the Role



The Revenue Cycle employee oversees all aspects of medical and vision billing to ensure accurate, timely reimbursement and a seamless financial experience for our patients. This role blends technical precision with collaborative leadership — ideal for someone who thrives on organization, coaching others, and improving systems that support both staff and patient satisfaction.



Key Responsibilities



Oversee end-to-end billing and reimbursement for medical and vision claims.

Verify insurance eligibility, benefits, and authorizations.

Train and coach staff on accurate coding (CPT, ICD-10, modifiers).

Monitor denials, submit appeals, and resolve unpaid claims efficiently.

Maintain credentialing for providers and locations (CAQH, NPI, directories).

Generate and review patient statements and resolve billing inquiries.

Analyze reports to identify trends and improve revenue cycle efficiency.

Collaborate with leadership to optimize processes and support team growth.

What We’re Looking For



Strong understanding of medical billing and coding (optometry experience a plus).

Exceptional communication and problem-solving skills.

Detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable leading a small team.

Proficient in EMR systems (RevolutionEHR preferred).

High level of professionalism and a commitment to exceptional service.

Why Join Premier Eye Associates



You’ll join a fast-growing, forward-thinking optometry group where innovation and patient care go hand in hand. We believe in empowering our team, celebrating wins, and continuously improving — both in how we care for patients and how we support one another.

title: Finance Virtual Assistant (UK-based)
description:
Are you an expert in Xero?

Are you an experienced bookkeeper and finance VA?

Are you highly proficient in Excel and Sheets?



If your answer is a resounding "YES" to all questions, this job is for you!



Position: Finance VA

Salary: $6.50 to $8.50 per hour

Job Type: Part-time (20 hours per week), with the potential to go full-time in the future

Working Hours: Monday to Friday between 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM UK time



Your main responsibilities will be to:



1. Bookkeeping (Main Responsibility)



- Use Xero to manage bookkeeping tasks

- Reconcile bank transactions

- Manage and record purchase bills

- Create purchase orders

- Prepare financial records for VAT quarters and year-end accounts

-  Review supplier statements and compare them with purchase orders

- Identify and report discrepancies between supplier statements and purchase orders

 

2. Project Financial Tracking



- Track the financial performance of projects

- Allocate costs for materials, labour, and purchase orders

- Monitor project profitability

- Prepare simple financial summaries to show project costs and profit margins

 

3. Buildertrend System Support



- Assist with the financial side of the Buildertrend system

- Support tasks related to project cost tracking, materials, labour, and purchase orders

- Learn and adapt quickly to the Buildertrend platform (experience is a plus but not required)

 

4. Supplier Quote Comparison



- Send material lists to 2–3 suppliers via

- Request and collect supplier quotes

- Compare prices from different suppliers

- Present the best option to the client

- Create purchase orders for the selected supplier

 

5. Other finance-related tasks as instructed



Must-have qualifications:



- Experience in bookkeeping, financial tracking, and administrative support

- Skilled in bank reconciliation, managing purchase bills, creating purchase orders, and reviewing supplier statements

- Proficient in Xero accounting software (at least a year experience)

- Experience preparing records for VAT quarters and year-end accounts

- Strong attention to detail

- Good English communication skills

- Excellent data entry skills (Excel and Google Sheets)

- Ability to identify discrepancies in financial records

 

Additional, nice-to-have qualifications:

- Experience supporting construction, renovation, or project-based businesses

- Familiarity with Buildertrend or similar project management systems

- Experience in supplier coordination, quote comparison, and purchase order management



Kindly include the link to your Resume in your application.

title: Paid Media Specialist (Google Ads & Meta Ads)
description:
Paid Media Specialist (Google Ads & Meta Ads)



Full-Time | Remote | Performance-Focused Role



About Us



We are a results-driven digital marketing agency helping businesses generate leads, conversions, and measurable growth through paid media campaigns.



We value data-driven thinking, ownership, and continuous improvement, and we’re looking for someone who shares the same mindset.



The Role



We are looking for a Paid Media Specialist to manage and optimize advertising campaigns across Google Ads and Meta platforms 
 & Instagram).



You will take ownership of campaign performance, analyze results, and implement strategies that drive measurable outcomes. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys testing, optimizing, and scaling campaigns while working closely with a collaborative team.



Key Responsibilities



Plan, launch, and manage campaigns across Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube, Performance Max) and Meta Ads



Conduct audience, keyword, and competitor research



Monitor performance and optimize campaigns based on KPIs (CPA, ROAS, CTR, CPC)



Collaborate with the team to test ad creatives and messaging



Manage ad budgets to maximize ROI



Set up and maintain tracking (Google Analytics, Tag Manager, Meta Pixel)



Prepare regular performance reports with actionable insights



Stay up to date with platform updates and industry trends



Requirements



1–3+ years of experience in paid media or digital advertising



Hands-on experience with Google Ads and Meta Ads



Strong analytical and problem-solving skills



Familiarity with tracking and reporting tools



Ability to manage multiple campaigns and meet deadlines



Good communication and collaboration skills

title: Video editor & social media assistant
description:
ABOUT ME:

Hi! I'm Emma — a fitness and wellness content creator and coach with 800k+ followers across platforms. I create content around mindset, fitness, travel, and living a healthy, balanced lifestyle. I'm looking for a creative, reliable right-hand person to join my team — not only to help edit videos, but to genuinely grow alongside me as my brand grows. If you're someone who takes initiative, has a good sense of humor, and cares about doing quality work, keep reading. :)



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Video Editing (edit short & long-form content using CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, and/or Adobe Premiere Pro. Adding simple captions, cuts, sound effects, music, etc.)

- Social Media Management (schedule and post content across platforms, help me reply to comments and DMs- comfortable engaging with my audience in my voice)

- Content Ideation, Trend Research & Analytics (help me research what's trending in my niche and pitch me ideas I can easily re-create as carousel posts or reels, like workout tips, nutrition facts, etc., also help me regularly review and analyze my social media analytics to understand what's working and adjust our strategy accordingly!)

- Graphic Design & Digital Products (co-create digital products like eBooks, lead magnets, and design visually appealing, informative carousel posts -- like what I eat in a day"-- in Canva)



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR:

- Strong, natural English (written & spoken)

- Experienced with software like Capcut, Davinci Resolve, Premiere Pro

- Proficient in Canva with an eye for design 

- Proficient with using major social media platforms (including Snapchat)

- Skilled at research and analytics (social media trends, fitness/nutrition tips, breaking down social media analytics)

- Self-motivated & deadline-driven with a growth mindset

- Good sense of humor -- to help me make funny videos (important!)



HOW TO APPLY:

Send me a short intro about yourself, your editing software experience, and links to any past work -- reels, YouTube videos, graphics, + any social accounts you've managed.



*BONUS: pitch me one carousel or reel idea you think would do well right now in the fitness/wellness space. I want to see how you think, not just what you've done :)*

title: Senior Webflow Designer
description:
About the Project:



I am a UK-based HR and employment law consultant repositioning my boutique consultancy toward strategic advisory and board-level services. 



-This is not a startup brand. 

-This is not an e-commerce site. 

-This is a premium professional services website. 



The goal is a clean, intelligent, grounded, bilingual Webflow website using a purchased premium template (Nikka). 

You will not be building from scratch — you will be refining and elevating. 



Scope of Work: 

-Customise purchased Webflow template 

-Implement brand colour system (dark-led, structured) 

-Apply typography (Exo + Montserrat) 

-Improve layout spacing and hierarchy 

-Advise on section structure where needed 

-Light copy refinement (clarity, grammar, tone polish) 

-Build structured bilingual setup (English + Greek path – you don’t need to know Greek, don’t worry!) 

-Implement subtle motion/animations professionally 

-Add client logo carousel 

-Ensure full mobile optimisation 

-Apply basic technical SEO (meta titles, alt text, H1 structure) 

-Connect the domain and prepare for launch. 



This Is NOT For You If: 

-You mainly build Shopify or WordPress sites 

-Your portfolio is colourful, startup-heavy, or sales-funnel focused 

-You rely heavily on AI-generated content 

-You cannot show consultancy or professional services examples 

-You struggle with English nuance. 



This IS For You If: 

-You are strong in Webflow (5+ years minimum) 

-You understand premium professional service positioning 

-You have built sites for consultants, law firms, strategy firms, or advisory businesses 

-You care deeply about spacing, typography, and hierarchy 

-You can suggest improvements instead of just following instructions 

-You communicate clearly and professionally. 



Deliverables:

-Fully customised Webflow site 

-Clean and elegant execution 

-Desktop + tablet + mobile optimisation 

-Bilingual structure implemented properly (no Google Translate plugins) 

-Site ready for domain connection and launch. 



To Apply:

Please include: 

1. 3 Webflow sites you have built that are clean, minimal, and professional 

2. A short paragraph explaining how you would elevate a premium consultancy template 

3. Please include your hourly rate and fixed project estimate in your application. 



Applications without portfolio links will not be considered.  



Budget:

I am willing to pay above-average rates for strong Webflow expertise and clean execution. 

This is not a “cheap build” project. Quality and attention to detail matter. 



In your application, include the word “Structure” at the top so I know you read the full description.

title: Operations & Account Manager
description:
Operations & Account Manager



U.S. Security Services – 24/7 Operational Leadership Role

Remote (Philippines) | Full-Time | 9:00 AM–5:00 PM PST + On-Call



We operate a 24/7 U.S.-based security services company managing 50+ field security personnel across multiple accounts.



This is NOT an assistant role.



This is an operations leadership position responsible for coverage stability, client confidence, and workforce control.



If a shift is uncovered — you solve it.

If a client escalates — you take command.

If a guard becomes unstable — you address it immediately.



You will be accountable for operational continuity.



?



What You Will Own



• Daily scheduling for 50+ U.S. field security employees

• Prevention of missed shifts and coverage gaps

• Call-off response, replacement coordination, and OT control

• Real-time shift adjustments and rebalancing strategy

• SLA response time enforcement

• Direct communication with U.S.-based clients

• Guard attendance tracking and performance management

• CRM documentation and ticket control in GoHighLevel

• Cross-team coordination with dispatch, recruiting, HR, and finance



This role requires decisive action and structured thinking.



?



Required Experience (Strict – Do Not Apply Without This)



• Minimum 3+ years in operations, dispatch, logistics, or 24/7 service industries

• Direct experience scheduling 30+ field employees

• Hands-on management of call-offs and urgent coverage issues

• Experience working in time-sensitive environments

• Active experience using GoHighLevel (required – not “willing to learn”)

• Experience using CRM or ticketing systems

• Basic HR exposure (attendance enforcement, discipline, performance issues)

• Strong English communication (written + verbal)

• Comfortable making decisions independently



If you have not managed scheduling at scale, do not apply.



?



Work Schedule



• 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST

• Must be reachable for urgent operational matters after hours



This is a 24/7 operations environment. Leadership availability matters.



?



Compensation



• $6 – $10 USD/hour (based on experience)

• Performance-based raises

• Clear path to Senior Operations Lead



High performers will grow quickly.



?



Application Requirements (Mandatory – No Exceptions)



Submit ALL of the following:

 1. Resume (PDF only)

 2. 2-minute video explaining your experience managing 30+ field staff

 3. 60-second voice recording confirming PST schedule + on-call availability

 4. List of all systems you’ve used (must include GoHighLevel if applicable)



Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



?



We are hiring operational ownership.

Not task followers.

title: Long-Term Virtual Assistant (Customer Support Focus – E-commerce)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand primarily active on online marketplaces, and we’re looking for a proactive, independent, and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our daily operations and long-term growth.



In the beginning, your work will be mainly focused on customer support (80–90%), with opportunities to grow into other areas over time if you perform well and are interested in doing that.

mber.

/chat support)

)

Why Work With Us?

Compensation

mbers.

This role ensures that lending activities comply with internal policies and regulatory requirements while minimizing delinquency and loan losses. The manager leads credit evaluation, portfolio monitoring, and recovery strategies to maintain a healthy loan portfolio.

Key Responsibilities:

1, Credit Management

2. Collections and Recovery

3. Risks Management and Compliance

4. Team Leadership

5. Reporting and Analysis

title: [Urgent] Remote Customer Service Virtual Assistant Hiring
description:
DLS Company is a big E-commerce brand with a great vision towards customers all around the world. Grow your skills, build your career, and thrive from home. Join now and start your journey while enjoying flexibility, growth opportunities, and a role where your contributions really matter.



I/ What You’ll Do:

- Provide exceptional customer support across multiple channels, including Chat,
, Phone, and Social Media, primarily for US and UK customers.

- Proactively resolve customer inquiries with efficiency and care, aiming to deliver memorable “WOW” customer support experiences.

- Leverage available working tools, systems, and training resources to quickly and accurately address customer issues.

- Strictly follow established workflows, SOPs, and guidelines set by team leaders.

- Enthusiastic and responsible in handling additional tasks assigned by managers and team leaders as needed.

- Proactively collect, evaluate, and share Voice of Customer (VOC) insights with team leaders to improve product and service quality.

- Proactively participate in interviews, coaching, and internal training activities (add-on responsibility).





II/ What We Are Looking For:

Professional Working Experience and Skills:

- 1+ year of customer service experience in E-commerce.

- 1+ year of hands-on experience with support tools such as Zendesk, Freshdesk, LiveChat, Freshcaller (experience with multiple tools is a plus).

- Strong English communication skills, both written and spoken (neutral or US accent preferred).

- Familiarity with various E-commerce platforms such as Amazon, Etsy, and/or Shopify.

- Experience participating in interviews and collecting, digging into customer Voice of Customer (VOC) insights via call, meeting, or online face-to-face interview.

- Positive customer-oriented mindset with strong problem-solving skills and proactive attitude.

- Ability to multitask effectively in a fast-paced working environment.

- Quick learner with a strong commitment to continuous improvement or changes.

- Willingness to support, collaborate, contribute and provide constructive feedback toward the shared team’s goals.

- Adaptable quickly to changing company needs, processes, and workflows.

- Able to fully commit to the required working schedule with minimal unplanned interruptions.



Working Conditions and Equipment

- A reliable computer with a functioning headset, webcam, and microphone (minimum 4GB RAM and 3–5 hours battery life).

- A stable, high-speed Internet connection with a minimum speed of 10 Mbps to ensure seamless communication.

- A private and quiet workspace to minimize background noise and distractions.

- Available Backup device and power source (preferred)

- Willingness to work across multiple communication channels and maintain flexibility in work schedules to meet customer needs.

- Not subject to pregnancy, special treatments, or caretaking responsibilities for children



PLEASE do this entrance form for your first application:

Search Australian Credit Savers | Credit Repair Experts in Google. Go to the Contact Us page and send an

title: Bluetooth App Developer (IoT Device – Supercapacitor Jump Starter)
description:
We are looking for a skilled mobile app developer to build a Bluetooth-connected app for a hardware product (supercapacitor jump starter).



The app will connect to our device via Bluetooth and display real-time data from the unit.



This is a long-term opportunity if the first version goes well.



Main Features Required:



Connect to device via Bluetooth (BLE)



Display real-time data from device:



Car battery voltage



Capacitor voltage



Charge current



Discharge current



Temperature



Battery percentage (starter pack + car battery)



Manual “Force Start” button inside the app



Display system status (charging, ready, discharging)



Clean and modern UI



We already have 2 reference apps for design and layout. You will follow these and make small improvements.



Important:



You must have experience with Bluetooth (BLE) apps and hardware communication.



Nice to Have:



Experience with IoT devices



Experience reading real-time sensor data



UI/UX design skills

title: AI Prompt Artist (Video & Generative Media)
description:
We are seeking a visionary AI Prompt Artist to join our team and help create premium commercial and corporate video content.



This role requires a strong combination of technical prompt engineering and creative direction. You will be responsible for producing high-quality AI-generated visuals and video content while collaborating with an international creative team.



Note:

We are not looking for candidates who only write prompts or create basic UGC-style AI content. The ideal candidate should have a strong creative eye and the ability to produce polished, commercial-quality visuals similar to advertising, branded campaigns, or corporate media.



Key Responsibilities



You will be responsible for developing advanced prompt workflows for AI-generated video, images, voice, and motion graphics. You will produce high-quality, commercial-level content for advertising, branded campaigns, and corporate use. The role also involves working with modern AI tools such as Google Veo, Runway, Luma, Midjourney, and ElevenLabs to create polished outputs.



In addition, you will organize and maintain prompt libraries and reusable templates, while building efficient workflows that support different formats and localized content. You will collaborate closely with producers and creative teams, making quick adjustments and improvements based on feedback to ensure all outputs meet brand and quality standards.



Required Qualifications:

Excellent written and spoken English communication skills.

At least 2–3+ years of experience using generative AI tools in a professional or production environment.

Proven experience producing AI-generated video or visual content.

Strong understanding of visual storytelling, cinematography, lighting, and pacing.

Reliable high-speed internet and a capable workstation.



Preferred Qualifications:

Experience with After Effects, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

Experience collaborating with international creative teams

Familiarity with tools such as Notion, Slack, and Frame.io

title: Video & Artwork Compliance Specialist (Filmhub QC Corrections
description:
We need an experienced Video & Artwork Compliance Specialist to correct QC issues flagged by Filmhub so our show can go live ASAP. This is a freelance, fast-turnaround role ideal for someone who understands Filmhub distribution requirements and has sharp technical and design skills.



Scope of Work:

 1. Artwork Revisions:

 • Redesign multiple artwork assets to meet Filmhub specs:

 • Ensure title name is clearly visible (proper font size, weight, contrast).

 • Remove all extra text (credits, watermarks, logos, etc.) except for the required title name.

 • Create episode-specific images that are textless (no titles/fonts) as needed.

 • Correct aspect ratio issues (no stretching, padding/borders, or distortion).

 • Deliver high-res, sharp images (no pixelation, blurriness).

 • Provide Season 16:9 textless images (recommended but preferred).

 2. Trailer Edits:

 • Re-edit trailer to:

 • Start within 2 seconds (no long pre-roll/slates/promos).

 • Remove all promos (social media handles, URLs, logos like YouTube/production logos).

 • Ensure trailer ends cleanly within 2 seconds (no slates or fade-outs).

 • Remove any letterboxing/pillarboxing and fix minor framing issues.

 • Address any visual artifacts (pixelation, compositing errors, burned-in text) for a clean final cut.

 • (If possible) Edit a general audience-friendly trailer version.

 3. Additional Tasks:

 • Deliver Music Cue Sheets (for both Main Video + Trailer) detailing all music tracks used.

 • Review metadata & confirm assets meet Filmhub Best Practices.



Must-Have Experience:

 • Proven track record with Filmhub, Amazon Prime Video Direct, or similar streaming platforms.

 • Advanced skills in:

 • Video editing (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, etc.).

 • Graphic design & image editing (Photoshop, Illustrator).

 • Deep understanding of aspect ratios, artwork specs, and QC standards.

 • Ability to work fast, independently, and deliver broadcast-ready materials.



Nice-to-Have:

 • Experience preparing cue sheets & clearance documentation.

 • Familiarity with episodic content requirements.



Deliverables:

Finalized artwork and trailers ready for re-upload to Filmhub, plus any required cue sheets and metadata corrections.

title: Business Virtual Assistant
description:
We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help build and strengthen our business credit profile by applying for company accounts, vendor credit lines, and financial products. This role is ideal for someone with experience in business credit building, administrative tasks, and online research.



Key Responsibilities:



Apply for vendor, net-30, and revolving credit accounts with various suppliers, lenders, and service providers.

Complete and manage online applications for business banking accounts, credit cards, and trade lines.

Track application statuses and maintain an organized log of all business credit activities.

Research and identify new vendors and financial institutions that report to business credit bureaus (e.g., Dun & Bradstreet, Experian Business, Equifax Business).

Ensure all required documents (EIN, LLC formation docs, utility bills, etc.) are up to date and submitted accurately.

Follow up with vendors and creditors as needed to confirm account reporting.

Monitor and update business credit profiles on platforms like Dun & Bradstreet, NAV, and Experian.

Provide weekly reports summarizing progress, approvals, denials, and next steps.

Stay updated on the latest trends and best practices in business credit building.

Qualifications:

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About Us

Rapid Flow Media is a content and visual production company operating in San Francisco and Germany, working at the intersection of tech, AI, and media. We produce high-quality visual content for fast-growing companies and are expanding into the AI and tech space across the US and Europe. We work with serious clients and move fast.



Where You Start

Your first project is the foundation: designing our company logo, brand deck. This is your chance to put your stamp on a company that is actively growing.



What the Role Grows Into

This is a full-time, long-term position. As we grow, you will be working on animated conference decks, pitch decks for tech and AI companies, feature launch graphics, social media assets, and visual content for clients across San Francisco and Germany. No two weeks will look the same.

What We Need From You



Strong logo and brand identity design

Pitch deck and presentation design (Google Slides, PowerPoint, or Keynote)

Website design IS A HUGE PLUS

Clean, modern, professional aesthetic — not flashy, not generic

Fast turnaround and strong communication in English

Ability to take a brief and run with it independently



Nice to Have

Motion graphics or basic animation

Experience designing for tech or startup clients

Familiarity with AI tools in your design workflow



What We Offer



Flexible full time position around 25-30hours

Starting salary: To be negotioted but first Logo design and Branded Website Deck will be compensated at $300 

Direct access to leadership — you will work closely with the founder

Real growth as the company scales into SF and Germany

Opportunity to grow into a senior creative role as the team expands



How to Apply

Send your portfolio and a short note (3–5 sentences max) on why this role fits where you are right now. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. Only ones with serious graphic design experience!

title: CAD Designer / Industrial Designer / Technical Illustrator: Remote Paid Review Work
description:
Parsewave is hiring Filipino professionals who work with CAD, 3D design, technical illustration, or industrial design for part-time paid review work. If you create or review technical drawings, 3D models, or design documentation professionally, we want to hear from you.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Review technical submissions involving 3D design, CAD work, and visual technical content for accuracy and quality. Each review takes about 20-30 minutes. You work on your own schedule with no fixed hours, no meetings and no supervisor check-ins.



WE'RE LOOKING FOR EXPERIENCE IN ANY OF THESE:

- CAD and 3D modeling (SolidWorks, AutoCAD, Fusion 360, CATIA, Inventor, Creo)

- Industrial design and product design

- Technical illustration and engineering drawings

- Architectural visualization and drafting (SketchUp, Revit, ArchiCAD)

- Interior design (space planning, rendering, material specification)

- FEA visualization and simulation output interpretation

- Manufacturing drawings and GD&T

- Animation and motion graphics (technical/engineering context)

- CNC programming and toolpath design

- BIM modeling and coordination



WHO THIS IS FOR:

Filipino CAD drafters, industrial designers, architects, interior designers, technical illustrators, or engineers who work heavily with 3D tools. Whether you're at a design firm, BPO, architectural office, or freelancing, your technical design knowledge is what we're paying for.



PAY:

$20 per review. Our other contributors are earning somewhere around $50 per hour.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Professional experience or formal training in CAD, industrial design, architecture, or technical illustration

- Strong written English

- Laptop or PC with stable internet

- Available at least 10 hours per week (you choose when)



APPLY:

Apply here: 



This is a short-term project and not a permanent position. No meetings, no micromanaging, just flexible income using the skills you already have.

title: Ecommerce video editor (FULL TIME)
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



VERY Highly valued skill:

- AI: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Kling, Nano Banana

Candidates with this skill set will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The Big opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

 “I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have AI experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you. 

Speak soon, Karos

title: VSL (Video Sales Letter) EDITOR
description:
NOW HIRING: VSL (Video Sales Letter) EDITOR Frank Media — under Franklin Media Group

Setup: Remote | Work From Home | Output-Based Earning Potential: 80,000 – 125,000+ pesos/month



This isn't a regular editing job. This is a high-income skill position.

Frank Media is looking for a VSL Editor who knows how to use editing to sell. You'll be creating 1-hour Video Sales Letters — the kind of videos that keep viewers locked in from the first second to the last, and turn them into buyers.

If you understand pacing, persuasion, and visual storytelling — and you want to get paid well for it — keep reading.



THE PAY (let's get straight to it)

?20,000 per VSL (1-hour long video) 5,000 retention bonus per VSL if viewer retention hits our benchmark

Monthly earning potential: 4 VSLs/month = 80,000 (100,000 with retention bonus) 5 VSLs/month = 100,
,000 with retention bonus) 6+ VSLs/month = 120,000+ (?150,000+ with retention bonus)

No earning cap. The more you produce, the more you take home. You control your income.

THE ROLE

You'll be our frontline weapon in sales — except your tool isn't a script, it's a timeline. Every VSL you produce is designed to convert viewers into customers. That means every cut, every transition, every text overlay has a purpose.

Day-to-day, you'll work on full-length VSLs from script to final render — pacing the story, layering in graphics, B-roll, and kinetic text, and making sure retention stays high throughout the entire hour. You'll collaborate directly with the team on revisions and feedback, and you'll have clear SOPs to guide your workflow.



YOU'RE A FIT IF YOU…

Have strong long-form editing skills (you've edited 30-minute to 1-hour+ content before) ? Understand how editing affects viewer behavior — you don't just make things "look nice," you make people stay ? Are proficient in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut, or similar?  Have a creative eye with obsessive attention to detail ? Can follow brand guidelines, take feedback, and maintain consistency across outputs ? Have your own editing setup and reliable internet ? Can commit to producing 4+ VSLs per month



BONUS POINTS (hindi required, pero malaking advantage)

May experience ka sa VSL, webinar, or direct response video editing ? You understand copywriting and persuasion — kahit basic level ? Alam mo kung paano mag-structure ng long-form content para hindi ma-bore yung viewer ? May motion graphics or kinetic typography skills ka



WHY THIS ROLE HITS DIFFERENT

 80K–125K+/month — hindi mo need ng 3 clients para maka-earn ng ganito, isang company lang  Performance = Pay — retention bonus rewards you for doing great work, not just fast work  Fully remote — bahay lang, walang commute, walang office politics  No cap on output — kung kaya mo mag-produce ng 6 VSLs a month, bayad ka ng 6  Structured workflow — may SOPs, may feedback system, hindi ka mag-guguess  You're joining a real company — Frank Media runs multiple brands and platforms reaching tens of thousands of people



HOW TO APPLY

Fill out our official application form: 







Include the following: Updated resume  Portfolio with long-form video samples (VSL, webinar, or 30min+ edits preferred)  Your availability to start

 Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

We review applications daily. Qualified applicants will be contacted for next steps.

title: Ecommerce video editor
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



VERY Highly valued skill:

- AI: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Kling, Nano Banana

Candidates with this skill set will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The Big opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

 “I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have AI experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you. 

Speak soon, Karos

title: Nurse / Pharmacist / MedTech / Healthcare Professional: Remote Paid Review Work (?800-1400/task)
description:
Parsewave is hiring Filipino healthcare professionals for part-time paid review work. If you're a licensed nurse, pharmacist, medical technologist, or any healthcare practitioner who wants flexible remote income that actually uses your clinical knowledge, this is for you.



PAY:

$20 per review. Our other contributors are earning somewhere around $50 per hour.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Review technical submissions in your specific area of healthcare expertise. Check for clinical accuracy, validate medical reasoning, flag errors. Each review takes about 20-30 minutes. You work on your own schedule with no fixed hours, no meetings and no supervisor check-ins.



WE'RE LOOKING FOR EXPERIENCE IN ANY OF THESE:

- Nursing (any specialization — ICU, ER, OR, OB, pedia, community health)

- Pharmacy and pharmacology

- Medical technology / Medical laboratory science

- Physical therapy and rehabilitation

- Occupational therapy

- Radiologic technology and medical imaging

- Respiratory therapy

- Nutrition and dietetics

- Public health and epidemiology

- Dentistry and dental technology

- Veterinary medicine

- Speech-language pathology

- Midwifery

- Health informatics



WHO THIS IS FOR:

Filipino board passers and licensed healthcare professionals. Whether you're currently at a hospital, clinic, government health unit, or abroad, your clinical training is what we're paying for. This works around your shifts and your schedule.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Licensed or board-certified in any healthcare field listed above

- At least 1 year of clinical, professional, or academic experience

- Strong written English

- Laptop or PC with stable internet

- Available at least 10 hours per week (you choose when)



APPLY:

Apply here: 



This is a short-term project and not a permanent position. No meetings, no micromanaging. Just flexible income using the skills you already have.

title: Direct Response Creative EXPERT for Meta Ads (Static Image Specialist)
description:
We are an ambitious and rapidly growing e-commerce brand committed to building a strong presence in the online retail space. As we expand our advertising efforts, we are looking for a skilled and creative Direct Response Picture Ads Editor to join our team.



Our marketing strategy relies heavily on high-performing static image ads designed to convert viewers into buyers. We need someone who understands the psychology of direct response advertising and has the technical and creative ability to produce scroll-stopping visuals that drive measurable results on platforms like Meta Ads 
 & Instagram).

This role requires someone who can not only edit quickly, but also deliver content that performs exceptionally well on platforms like Meta Ads.



While this role focuses primarily on image creation and editing, experience or interest in video editing is a plus, as we anticipate expanding into more video content in the future.



Key Responsibilities:

• Designing and editing high-converting static image ads for Meta Ads.

• Creating multiple variations (hooks, layouts, and copy) for A/B testing.

• Continuously analyzing ad performance and refining creatives based on data insights.

• Using tools like Photoshop, Canva, or Figma (and optionally AI design tools, to enhance creativity and delivery) to create visually compelling, conversion-focused content.

• Staying up to date with current trends in e-commerce and Meta advertising.

• Testing all pictures on Meta Ads to evaluate performance and refine creative approaches.

• Continuously optimizing editing techniques to improve ad performance.



Qualifications & Skills:

• Proven experience editing direct response ads for e-commerce brands.

• Proficiency in Photoshop, Canva, or Figma, or similar editing software.

• Familiarity with AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas.

• Strong understanding of direct response advertising principles.

• Ability to work quickly and deliver multiple high-quality creative variations quickly under tight deadlines.

• Motivation to (eventually) work exclusively for our brand and contribute to its growth.



Application Process:

To ensure you have read this listing carefully, please begin your application with the phrase: “I create high-converting image ads.”



In your application, please include the following:

• A brief description of your experience with editing and direct response ads.

• Links to previous work, especially relevant e-commerce ads.

• Your availability and how quickly you can start.



This is a remote position with flexible hours, and compensation will be determined based on your experience and skill level. We are excited to find a talented individual who is eager to grow with us and consistently deliver outstanding results.



Apply now to join our team and help us take our advertising efforts to the next level.

title: Senior Performance Marketing Specialist (Google Ads & Meta Ads)
description:

About Us

We value ownership, clear thinking, and continuous improvement — and we’re looking for someone who shares the same mindset.



The Role

This is a mid-to-senior level position where you will work closely with the founder, contribute to strategic decisions, and play a key role in driving measurable results.



You should be comfortable working independently, making data-driven decisions, and taking full ownership of campaign performance.

 & Instagram)

Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)



Lead generation campaigns

title: SALES SUPPORT SPECIALIST
description:
SALES SUPPORT SPECIALIST



Position Overview: 

The Sales Support Specialist will play a crucial role in assisting our sales team to ensure smooth and efficient operations. This role involves handling administrative tasks, managing customer inquiries, and providing support to the sales representatives to enhance productivity and customer satisfaction.





Key Responsibilities:

• Provide administrative support to the sales team, including preparing sales documents, managing calendars, and coordinating meetings.

• Respond to customer inquiries via phone,
, and chat, ensuring timely and accurate information.

• Process sales orders and ensure accurate data entry in the CRM system.

• Assist in the preparation of sales reports, presentations, and proposals.

• Coordinate with other departments to ensure seamless order fulfillment and delivery.

• Maintain and update customer records, ensuring all information is accurate and up-to-date.

• Support the sales team in lead generation and follow-up activities.
