title: Senior EU Product Compliance specialist
description:
At Instrux, we help companies bring products to market in the right way. We support clients with EU product compliance by translating regulations into practical actions, reviewing technical documentation, and helping them make sound compliance decisions. Our projects range from straightforward documentation support to more complex compliance challenges that require research, interpretation, and client advice.



We are looking for a Senior EU Product Compliance Specialist who can take ownership of projects, perform regulatory research, and advise clients with confidence. This role is for someone who is comfortable working independently, communicating directly with clients, and turning complex requirements into clear recommendations.



What you will do



- Lead EU product compliance projects from review to recommendation

- Research applicable EU legislation, standards, and product requirements

- Review technical documentation and identify compliance gaps or risks

- Draft risk assessments according to ISO 12100 or GPSR guidelines

- Advise clients on documentation, conformity requirements, and next steps

- Draft or review Declarations of Conformity and technical files where needed

- Communicate with clients, suppliers, and other stakeholders to move projects forward

- Translate complex compliance topics into practical and understandable advice

- Support internal knowledge building and contribute to strong project delivery



What we are looking for



- Solid experience in EU product compliance, mainly CE/GPSR/FCM/REACH (3 -5 years day to day experience)

- Strong research and analytical skills

- Confident in reviewing regulations and applying them to real products and situations

- Able to manage projects independently and keep 
ntum

- Clear and professional written and spoken English

- Strong communication skills with clients and suppliers

- Detail-oriented, practical, and solution-focused

- Comfortable working fully remote

title: Administrative Assistant
description:
We’re hiring an Administrative Assistant who’s not only organized, but also comfortable working with transaction records and documents. A big part of this job is helping us review transactions, keep things clean and documented, and flag anything that doesn’t make sense.



You don’t need to be an accountant—but you should be the type of person who looks at a transaction and thinks: “What is this? Why did it happen? Does it match the story and the paperwork?”



What You’ll Do



Keep schedules, files, and documents organized (digital + any physical paperwork)



Help review transaction lists and supporting documents (bank activity, receipts, invoices, payment confirmations)



Categorize and label transactions clearly so the team can understand them quickly



Flag transactions that look unusual, inconsistent, duplicated, or missing documentation



Follow up internally (and sometimes with vendors) to confirm what a transaction is and why it happened



Prepare simple summaries for management (e.g., “these 12 transactions need clarification”)



Handle general admin work:
, calls, forms, basic spreadsheets, scanning/uploading, etc.



What We’re Looking For



Strong attention to detail (you naturally catch things others miss)



Comfortable working with spreadsheets and lists (Excel or Google Sheets)



Clear communication and confidence asking questions when something doesn’t add up



Professional handling of confidential information



1+ year in admin, operations, office support, or similar

title: TikTok Shop Operations Manager
description:
Own end-to-end TikTok Shop operations for creator storefronts. You will set up shops, manage product catalogs, coordinate fulfillment, ensure policy compliance, and build scalable processes so creators can sell without friction. This role suits a highly organized, proactive operator who loves turning moving parts into clean, reliable systems.



Responsibilities:



Lead onboarding and configuration of new TikTok Shops for creators, ensuring fast, accurate setup.

Manage the full product listing lifecycle: uploads, keywords, creatives, pricing updates, inventory sync, and listing health.

Coordinate order flow between internal fulfillment systems and TikTok Shop; monitor SLAs, troubleshoot shipping and OMS issues, and resolve exceptions.

Maintain platform compliance by mastering TikTok Shop policies, guidelines, rating standards, and best practices.

Partner with Creator Management and DTC Strategy on promos and campaigns; provide operational readiness plans and post-mortems.

Build and maintain SOPs, checklists, and documentation; design scalable processes and automations to reduce errors and manual work.

Track operational KPIs such as listing accuracy, order cycle times, cancellation rate, on-time ship rate, and store rating; surface insights and corrective actions.



Requirements:



2+ years in e-commerce operations, marketplace management, or similar operational role. Direct TikTok Shop experience is a strong plus.

Proven organizational rigor and attention to detail across multi-step workflows and cross-team dependencies.

Strong problem solving skills with the ability to anticipate risks, triage issues, and drive resolutions quickly.

Process builder who documents clearly and improves systems over time.

Excellent written and verbal communication for internal teams and creator partners.

Comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment with shifting priorities.



Bonus: experience with Shopify, Amazon Seller Central, OMS tools, and basic logistics and fulfillment concepts; familiarity with SQL or workflow automation is helpful.

title: Influencer Coordinator
description:
Job Summary:



We are seeking an Influencer Coordinator / Affiliate Outreach Coordinator to support and scale a fast-growing brand’s affiliate and creator partnerships. This role focuses on building strong relationships with creators, managing ongoing campaigns, tracking performance, and ensuring timely execution across deliverables, payments, and content documentation. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to help grow a high-performing influencer and affiliate ecosystem aligned with broader marketing and growth objectives.



Responsibilities:

- Manage and optimize relationships with existing and prospective affiliate and influencer partners

- Maintain regular communication with assigned creators to ensure deliverables are met, contracts are followed, and content quality standards are upheld

- Monitor trends and patterns across social and digital marketing efforts to identify new opportunities

- Coordinate with internal teams on payment terms, schedules, and delivery to ensure creators are paid accurately and on time

- Track and document all content produced by creators in designated folders and internal systems

- Log creator posts daily, including publish dates, performance metrics, and post links

- Contract a targeted number of creators on a weekly basis to meet campaign and business goals

- Source, evaluate, and engage new influencer and affiliate partners across platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
, and

- Negotiate and manage influencer partnerships while maintaining strong, ongoing relationships

- Review influencer content to ensure compliance with brand guidelines, tone, and messaging prior to posting

- Assist in creating influencer briefs, one-pagers, and campaign documentation aligned with marketing objectives

- Collaborate with design and content teams to support the creation of high-quality social and creator-led content



Requirements:

- Minimum of 3 years of experience in influencer coordination, affiliate outreach, or a related role

- Strong expertise across major social media platforms, particularly Instagram and TikTok

- Solid understanding of marketing metrics and the ability to analyze performance data and KPIs

- Experience with editorial and social media content development, with a foundational understanding of digital design and user experience principles

- Proven track record of successfully managing and scaling influencer or affiliate programs

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills with strong attention to detail

- Strong organizational and time management skills, with the ability to manage multiple creators and deadlines simultaneously

- Experience working in a high-growth or startup environment; SaaS or B2B experience is a strong plus

title: Retention Marketing Manager
description:
We’re looking for a seasoned Retention Marketing Manager to take ownership of
, SMS, and direct mail programs. This role is essential in deepening customer loyalty, increasing repeat purchases, and expanding the subscriber base. Working closely with creative and e-commerce teams, you'll drive strategy and execution while ensuring all retention touchpoints align with a bold, engaging brand identity.



Responsibilities:



Lead strategy and execution of retention marketing across
, SMS, and direct mail channels.

Collaborate with creative teams to develop compelling assets that align with the brand’s voice and visual identity.

Analyze campaign performance metrics such as repeat purchase rates, subscriber growth, and segmentation efficiency to optimize strategies.

Use tools like Asana and Klaviyo to manage workflows, ensuring efficient campaign planning and execution.

Own the retention marketing budget and prioritize initiatives based on ROI and impact.

5+ years of experience in retention marketing, preferably within a direct-to-consumer or lifestyle brand.

Strong analytical skills with a proven ability to turn insights into actionable strategies.

Up-to-date with digital trends, cultural 
nts, and evolving consumer behavior

title: TikTok Shop Content Strategist
description:
We are seeking a TikTok Shop Content Strategist who is deeply TikTok-native and experienced in both creative strategy and hands-on content creation. This role sits at the intersection of trend forecasting, performance analysis, and short-form video production, with a clear focus on driving engagement, discovery, and revenue through TikTok. You will own the TikTok content roadmap end-to-end, translating insights and trends into scroll-stopping, conversion-driven content while collaborating closely with Growth, Creative, Influencer, and Paid teams.



Responsibilities:



Own and execute the TikTok content strategy aligned with brand, growth, and product priorities

Build and manage weekly and monthly content calendars tied to launches, campaigns, and cultural 
nts

Translate performance insights into actionable creative briefs, concepts, and content themes

Identify whitespace opportunities across formats such as UGC-style content, trends, education, POVs, and product demos

Concept, script, film, and edit TikTok content optimized for platform-native performance

Create authentic, non-overproduced videos that resonate with TikTok audiences

Test multiple hooks, angles, and storytelling structures per concept and iterate rapidly based on results

Monitor TikTok trends, sounds, formats, and creator behavior, adapting them in a brand-safe and commercially relevant way

Track and analyze content performance including views, engagement, saves, CTR, and conversions

Partner with growth and paid teams to identify high-performing organic content for amplification

Collaborate with influencer, affiliate, creative, and brand teams to ensure consistency in voice, tone, and visual identity

Support product launches with high-impact TikTok storytelling



Requirements:



1–2+ years of experience creating and/or strategizing TikTok content for a brand or creator account

Deep understanding of TikTok trends, algorithms, and creator culture

Proven ability to produce content that drives both engagement and conversion

Strong storytelling instincts with a clear focus on hooks and retention

Comfortable being on camera and directing others on camera when needed

Highly organized, fast-moving, and comfortable testing, learning, and iterating quickly

Data-informed creative mindset with a focus on performance over vanity metrics

title: Amazon Catalog Manager
description:
Job Summary:



We’re seeking an experienced Amazon Catalog Manager to own end-to-end listing health and performance for a large SKU portfolio. You’ll manage backend attributes and compliance, optimize front-end content, and analyze key metrics to improve rankings, conversion, and revenue. Ideal for a data-driven operator with deep Seller Central expertise and a track record scaling large catalogs.



Responsibilities:



Catalog Management



Maintain and optimize 500+ SKUs in Seller Central, ensuring accurate categories, browse nodes, variations, and buy box–relevant settings.



Execute monthly content audits (titles, bullets, images, A+), fix suppressions/stranded inventory, and uphold Amazon TOS and compliance.



Manage backend attributes (search terms, item type keywords, intended use, target audience) and ensure listing data integrity.



Sales & Ranking Optimization



Track keyword rankings, CVR, pricing, and subcategory BSR; set weekly sales targets and target BSR per ASIN.



Identify underperforming listings and implement remediation plans (content, offers, pricing/ coupons, deals, images, reviews strategy inputs).



Monitor profitability and contribution margins, coordinating with ads and pricing to hit goals.



Insights & Collaboration



Partner with internal teams on pricing, promotions, creative, and inventory to align levers with growth targets.



Run competitive audits (content, offers, reviews, price moves) and recommend tactical adjustments.



Build and deliver actionable, data-driven performance reports and dashboards.



Requirements:



4+ years hands-on experience in Amazon Seller Central (required).



Proven success managing large catalogs (500+ SKUs) with complex variations.



Advanced Excel/Google Sheets (lookups, pivots, data cleaning).



Expert knowledge of listing optimization, keyword research/strategy, and backend attributes.



Strong grasp of Amazon TOS, compliance, suppressions, and listing health mechanics.



Familiarity with Sellerboard, Keepa, DataRova (or similar) is a plus.



Fluent English; highly organized, analytical, and self-directed.



Committed to a single full-time role.

title: Amazon Sourcing Specialist
description:
We’re seeking a detail-oriented and cost-conscious Purchasing/Sourcing Specialist to manage and optimize supplier relationships for our Amazon private-label and marketplace operations. You will lead supplier sourcing and negotiation, build landed cost models, and manage execution across samples, POs, freight, and replenishment. The ideal candidate combines sharp cost analysis with operational rigor — ensuring supply chain flows smoothly to FBA/3PL while hitting margin and targets.



Responsibilities:



Source, vet, and onboard manufacturers; run RFQs and negotiate pricing, MOQ, lead times, and payment terms

Build and maintain accurate landed cost models, factoring in duties, freight, and FBA fees to achieve margin goals

Coordinate product samples, specs, labeling, packaging, and regulatory compliance for Amazon and category standards

Create and track POs from production through delivery; ensure on-time, in-full (OTIF) performance from suppliers and carriers

Track vendor performance on cost, quality, lead time, and defect rate; lead corrective actions as needed

Conduct supplier audits and risk assessments, including geopolitical, compliance, and capacity considerations

Drive cost-saving initiatives through negotiation, packaging optimization, freight consolidation, or alternate sourcing

Support continuous improvement in sourcing processes and supplier performance



Requirements:



3+ years in purchasing, sourcing, or supply chain — ideally for Amazon FBA or e-commerce businesses

Proven experience negotiating with overseas factories, including MOQs, pricing, and payment terms

Solid understanding of landed cost analysis, profit margins, and Amazon’s fee structures

Working knowledge of quality control checkpoints and regulatory product compliance

Advanced Excel or Google Sheets skills; familiarity with PO systems

Strong organization, documentation, and multi-SKU project management ability

Proactive problem-solver who can work autonomously in a fast-paced, remote environment

Familiarity with sourcing and market tools like Helium 10 or Keepa is preferred

Experience with EDI, inventory planning, or demand forecasting is preferred

Category experience in regulated goods such as home improvement products or replacement parts is a plus

Exposure to total cost of ownership (TCO) analysis in sourcing decisions is a plus

title: Amazon Brand Manager
description:
We’re looking for a performance-driven Amazon Brand Manager to own and grow our presence across multiple Amazon storefronts. If you thrive in fast-paced e-commerce environments, know Amazon inside and out, and can juggle strategy, execution, and analysis across several brands simultaneously, this role is for you.



Responsibilities:



Multistorefront Management: Own and scale 5+ Amazon storefronts, ensuring consistent brand voice, high-quality visuals, and fully optimized listings.

Launch & Promo Strategy: Plan and execute product launches, promotions, and seasonal campaigns to maximize visibility and sales.

Performance Monitoring: Track storefront KPIs (sales, traffic, conversion, advertising ROI), customer feedback, and competitor moves—turn insights into actionable strategies.

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Coordinate with creative, PPC, inventory, and logistics teams to align messaging, stock, and advertising.

Compliance & Trends: Stay up-to-date with Amazon algorithm updates, policies, and marketplace trends to maintain optimal visibility and compliance.

Listing Optimization: Implement Amazon SEO best practices—optimize titles, bullets, descriptions, keywords, and A+ content.

UX & Conversion: Lead storefront UX improvements, A/B tests, and creative updates to boost conversion and engagement.

Reporting: Produce regular dashboards and reports summarizing performance and recommending next steps for growth.



Requirements:



Proven experience managing 5+ Amazon storefronts simultaneously.

3+ years in Amazon brand management, e-commerce, or digital marketing.

Deep knowledge of Amazon Seller Central, Brand Registry, A+ / Premium A+ content, and Amazon SEO.

Analytical mindset with demonstrated success in improving sales, conversion rates, and advertising ROI.

Comfortable using keyword research and listing-optimization tools; adept at data interpretation and strategic planning.

Strong project-management, communication, and cross-functional collaboration skills.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive in problem-solving.

Experience with Helium 10, Jungle Scout, DataHawk, or similar analytics suites is a plus.

Familiarity with Amazon DSP or external traffic/acquisition strategies is a plus.

Graphic-design chops or oversight experience for creative production is a plus.

Knowledge of international Amazon marketplaces (UK, EU, CA, etc.) is a plus.

title: Marketing Coordinator (Full-time remote work, earn up to USD 1,600)
description:
Background



The Reliability Academy delivers world-class online training and coaching to clients and students across the globe. To date, we have helped 100+ companies, and trained 2000+ industry professionals, across 50+ countries in all major industries. Founded in 2018, we are headquartered in Brisbane, Australia but work virtually with most of our team based in the Philippines.



Please note this role is advertised as based in the Philippines but we are open to applications for people anywhere in the world.



About Us



Our customers are in all parts of the world, from individuals to large multinational companies. We have big plans and are working to deliver our online training in 8-10 different languages to better serve our customers. We believe in being a force for good and that means:



- building a great company with a strong focus on our values and behaviors. We are building a small, but mighty team that truly enjoys working together and delivers a world-class product and experience to our customers.

- serving our niche to the best of our ability and reaching those less fortunate than us. To that purpose, we have launched the Reliability Academy Scholarship Program enabling students in developing nations to access our training with a 75% Scholarship

- aligning our company mission and vision to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals



The company is growing with a small team of full-time and part-time contractors working across the Asia-Pacific region, currently all reporting to the General Manager, also based in the Philippines whilst our Managing Director is based in Brisbane, Australia. We deliberately hire talent in different regions of the world to keep costs down, create diversity, and build a multi-lingual team.



Role Purpose 



The Marketing Coordinator is responsible for driving online sales growth through B2C marketing initiatives, with a focus on optimizing existing systems, improving conversion performance, and ensuring every campaign contributes directly to revenue. 



This role will oversee the Affiliate Program, manage lead segmentation using RightMessage, and conduct a full audit and optimization of HubSpot
 sequences—including welcome and nurture workflows—to ensure maximum engagement and conversion. 



The Marketing Coordinator will also manage and monitor paid campaigns to drive online course sales and continually refine strategies based on data and performance insights. 



Responsibilities  



As Marketing Coordinator your initial responsibilities will consist of: 



Demand Generation and Strategy 



-Develop and execute marketing strategies aligned with company goals, focusing on driving online B2C conversions. 

-Plan and manage marketing campaigns, PPC campaigns primarily for B2C (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads,
 Ads)

-Continuously monitor, test, and tweak campaigns to optimize results and maximize performance.

-Use RightMessage to manage lead segmentation, ensuring the right message reaches the right audience (B2B and B2C). Monitor performance, refine targeting, and adjust settings as needed by leveraging analytics / insights from Segmetrics. 



Affiliate Program Management 



-Oversee and manage the company’s Affiliate Program using TrackDesk.

-Test and validate system functionality, ensuring affiliates are properly tracked and rewarded.

-Monitor affiliate performance, identify top-performing partners, and develop strategies to drive participation and conversions. 



 Marketing and Automation 



-Review, audit, and optimize
 sequences and workflows within HubSpot, including welcome sequences and nurturing campaigns. 

-Identify opportunities to improve engagement and conversion rates. 

-Make recommendations for adjustments and implement approved changes. 

-Ensure marketing automation and workflows support the company’s inbound marketing and lead nurturing goals. 



Marketing Analytics and HubSpot Management 



-Develop and maintain a marketing performance dashboard to track key metrics, such as lead volume, conversion rates, and website traffic. 

-Integrate and manage HubSpot, cold
 systems, and campaign tracking tools for marketing automation, lead tracking, and reporting. 

-Analyze performance data to optimize campaigns and recommend improvements. 

-Report on marketing activities and outcomes to the General Manager and Managing Director. 





What Success Looks Like 



Succeeding in this role will mean the Marketing Team establishes a steadily growing flow of online course sales, supported by consistent brand visibility and engagement across all channels.  



Success will be measured by the following metrics: 



-Affiliate Program is fully operational and generating measurable conversions. 

-RightMessage segmentation is active and optimized for effective lead targeting. 

-HubSpot workflows and sequences are running efficiently and driving engagement and sales. 

-LinkedIn page is active with regular, relevant posts that maintain engagement and brand trust. 

-Paid campaigns on Google, LinkedIn, and
 achieve an average 
 of 3x or higher. 

-Overall marketing performance shows measurable improvement in lead quality, conversion rates, and ROI. 

 



About You 



Knowledge and skills are important, but we will primarily hire based on attitude and behavior. We are looking for someone who: 



-Is self-motivated and proactive with a positive attitude and a great work ethic. 

-Takes ownership of their work and is results-driven, constantly seeking to improve and optimize. 

-Communicates clearly and effectively, both with internal teams and external stakeholders. 

-Has a deep understanding of inbound marketing strategies and can balance creativity with data-driven decisions. 

-Enjoys working remotely and thrives in a remote, collaborative environment and is comfortable managing a distributed, diverse team.   

-Is passionate about inbound marketing and embraces data-driven decision-making. 



Your Skills 



Your knowledge, skills and experience: 



-Proven experience in inbound and outbound marketing, and demand generation. 

-Strong digital marketing skills: PPC ads (Google, LinkedIn,
), SEO, outbound (cold
 / LinkedIn outreach) 

-Experience managing marketing performance metrics and reporting on results. 

-Experience with HubSpot Marketing Solution is a requirement; Candidates with experience on Segmetrics, RightMessage and TrackDesk (or similar tools) will be given stronger consideration. 

-Experience in PPC campaign management (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads,
 Ads). 

-Excellent organizational and project management skills. 

-Excellent copywriting and proof-reading skills.  

-You are fluent in English with excellent written and verbal communication skills. Your written English is clear, concise, and accurate. 

-A sound understanding / experience with automation tools and AI (LLMs, agents) would be a bonus, as would experience in leading/managing/coordinating a team 



What’s on Offer



This is a long-term virtual role allowing you to work from home. You will work during Australian business hours i.e. your workday will fall between 7 am to 7 pm GMT+10 to ensure overlap with the rest of the team (who are based in the Philippines). There will be a 3-month probation period.



Base pay between USD 1,000 and USD 1,600 per month depending on experience and skills, with a 13th-month pay in December, 20 days of paid leave, an annual allowance of USD 1,000 towards Private Health Insurance and a chance to earn a performance bonus up to 3 months of salary (subject to business and personal performance).



Applying



If you are interested, please complete the online application (see link below) summarizing your background, experience, and what makes you an excellent candidate for the role. Tell us about yourself, your skills, and why you’re interested in working with us.



Application form: 



This is an important requirement for Reliability Academy, and we would love to have someone on seat as soon as possible, but we will take our time to find the right candidate. That means we will be shortlisting and interviewing soon after this job post has gone live and will continue until we find the right candidate. Therefore, this job could stay open for several weeks or close quickly



Please note, that if you do not apply via the above application form your application will not be considered. We appreciate people who pay attention to detail so please mention the words “Green Banana” when we ask about your aspirations in life.

title: Client Coach – Start at $935 + Bonuses (Grow to $2K+)
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role



Start at $935 per month base.

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

- All tools provided

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

- Join daily team check-ins

- Your role is to help clients succeed and stay long-term.



What We’re Looking For



- Strong English (written and spoken)

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Quiet workspace

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#2: Years of short-form content experience

#3: Years of client management experience

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

#5: Your portfolio



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Operations Coordinator
description:
***CUSTOMER SUPPORT EXPERIENCE IN A SERVICE-BASED OR TRADE-RELATED INDUSTRY IS PREFERRED FOR THIS POSITION.***



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS:

TO APPLY FOR THIS POSITION, PLEASE FOLLOW THESE STEPS:

     1. SET THE SUBJECT OF YOUR
 AS “COORDINATOR”.

• Experience with CRM software – an advantage

title: Social Media & Content VA – Counselling Practice (Instagram, GBP, Facebook, LinkedIn)
description:
About Us

We are an Australian counselling practice supporting individuals, couples, and families through thoughtful, evidence-based counselling.



We are looking for a Social Media & Content VA to help us maintain a consistent and meaningful online presence.



Role Overview

This role focuses on creating and scheduling content that feels warm, reflective, and aligned with a counselling practice. Content should be thoughtful and supportive — not overly promotional.



Responsibilities

• Create and schedule social media posts (Instagram,
, LinkedIn)

• Write captions in a warm, reflective tone

• Repurpose blog content into multiple posts

• Post weekly updates on Google Business Profile

• Create simple Canva graphics

• Assist with light content planning

• Suggest ideas to improve engagement and reach



Important Note

We are a counselling practice, so content must feel thoughtful, respectful, and not overly sales-focused.



Required Skills

• Social media content creation

• Strong writing skills (English)

• Canva or similar design tools

• Attention to tone and detail



Preferred Experience

Experience working with:

• healthcare or wellness businesses

• therapists or counselling services

• values-based or service-based brands



Hours

Potential to increase as the practice grows



To Apply

A short paragraph on how you would approach content for a counselling practice



The word “growth” in the first line of your application



Please do not use AI-generated responses — we are looking for authentic communication.

title: Client Coach – Start at $935 + Bonuses (Grow to $2K+)
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role



Start at $935 per month base.

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

- All tools provided

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

- Join daily team check-ins

- Your role is to help clients succeed and stay long-term.



What We’re Looking For



- Strong English (written and spoken)

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Quiet workspace

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#2: Years of short-form content experience

#3: Years of client management experience

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

#5: Your portfolio



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

?

?

?

title: Video Editor for Aviation Documentaries – Long-Term
description:
We are looking for a talented Video Editor to join the team for our YouTube channel.

We only want SERIOUS applicants, with genuine interest.



We produce high-quality, long-form aviation documentaries. Our content explores everything in the range of aviation. We aren't just looking for someone to "cut clips", we need a storyteller who can use pacing, sound design, and archival footage to create a sense of mystery and tension.



Example channels (these are examples so we don’t want copies of it)













What You Will Be Doing

Cinematic Editing: Creating 15-23 minute documentary-style videos with a "video essay" feel.

Visual Sourcing: Finding high-quality B-roll, historical aviation footage, technical diagrams to explain complex flight concepts, create overlays, animations and motion graphics.

Atmospheric Sound Design: Our videos are using background music but very soft. Only the first 5 seconds should be louder.

Retention Hooks: Crafting intense, "must-watch" openings in the first 60 seconds.

Collaboration: Using Trello to receive scripts/voiceovers and manage feedback.



Who We Are Looking For

The Documentary Specialist: You understand how to maintain interest over a 15 - 23 minute video.

The Technical Eye: You can visually represent what the narrator is saying.

Software: Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or After Effects.

Aviation Interest (Huge Plus): If you know your Boeing from your Airbus, you’ll love this role.



Compensation & Growth

Pilot: We start with a 1-minute test edit to check for style alignment.

Trial Video: $10 for your first full video.

Ongoing Rate: Once established, we move to $15 per video with a consistent workflow of 3 videos per week. Every minute over 23 minutes is an extra $1

We are looking for a long-term partner to grow with the channel.

We will work with extra BONUS if a video does well.



How to apply:



We only review applications from people who pay attention to detail. To apply, please follow these steps:

Start your application with the word "MAYDAY".

Provide links to 1–2 examples of faceless documentary-style videos you have edited (Aviation, History, or Engineering niches are a huge plus).

Write a 2-3 sentence note on what you think makes a "hook" successful in a documentary about an aviation

Confirm your typical turnaround time for a 15-20 minute edit once you receive the voiceover and script.

Note: Applicants who do not include the keyword or samples will be automatically disqualified.



We'll ask you for a sample of a minute with turnaround of max 24h



What you’ll receive

We’ll send you:

The full script and voiceover

Complete and honest feedback



Budget + payment

We pay per video. For this test video, the budget is $10 for a 17-23 minute video with voiceover and B-roll. If the quality is strong and delivery is smooth, we’d love to move into a long-term partnership with more videos per week at a $15 rate for a 17-23minute video.



Payment is released after the final approved edit. The better the channel gets the higher the fee goes per video.

title: Ops assistant
description:
Hiring: Operations Assistant (Onboarding & Admin)



???? Davao City (Roxas area)



We’re looking for an Operations Assistant to support our data collection program.



This role works closely with the Ops Manager and involves both onboarding participants (field work) and admin/coordination tasks (office work).



What You’ll Do

Onboarding & Participant Support



- Assist in onboarding sessions (can involve large groups)

- Help guide participants during setup and first use

- Assist with cap fitting and setup

- Help answer participant questions during sessions

- Support orientation sessions when needed



Hardware Preparation

- Assist in testing RoboCaps before onboarding

- Test powerbanks and accessories

- Prepare and organize equipment for onboarding sessions

- Help label and organize hardware



Admin & Coordination



- Maintain participant records and status (lead, oriented, onboarded, active, etc.)

- Update ClickUp and Google sheets tracking

- Track cap assignments and inventory

- Schedule onboarding and orientation sessions

- Maintain lists of leads and referrals

- Track uploads and operational progress



General Support

- Assist the Ops Manager in daily operations

- Help coordinate with collectors and uploaders when needed

- Support participant concerns and basic inquiries



Requirements

- Must be based in Davao City, preferably near Roxas area

- Must have own laptop

- Willing to work on-site in Roxas

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Good communication skills

- Comfortable handling both admin work and field work

- Able to assist in sessions with large groups

- Reliable and proactive



Work Expectations



- This role is fast-paced and demanding.

- Work may include weekends depending on onboarding schedules

title: Video editor needed — AI-assisted content & UGC for Hebrew-speaking e-commerce brand
description:
We're a wellness e-commerce brand looking for a talented video editor to produce polished content across multiple formats. The videos are targeted at Hebrew-speaking customers



you don't need to speak or understand Hebrew. We provide all scripts, captions, and instructions in English so you can work with confidence.



No Hebrew required. All scripts, voiceovers, captions, and timing instructions will be fully prepared for you. Your job is purely creative editing — we handle the language side completely.



What you'll be editing:

1. Short-form

Instagram Reels & TikTok — fast-paced, hook-driven cuts



2. UGC-style

AI-generated & raw creator footage edited to feel authentic and native



3. Product demos

Clean, clear product highlight videos for ads & landing pages



AI tools [a core part of this role]

This is not optional - we actively use AI in our production workflow and expect you to do the same.



Using AI video tools (Runway, Kling, Pika, HeyGen, or similar) to generate UGC-style content, synthetic presenters, lifestyle scenes, or product visuals



Generating AI b-roll footage that matches the tone and context of each video [not just stock filler]



Seamlessly blending AI-generated clips with real footage so the final result feels cohesive and natural



Who we're looking for

Strong editing portfolio ideally across multiple formats (short-form, ads, UGC)



Proven experience using AI tools for UGC creation and b-roll generation - please show examples



Experience editing content in languages other than English [comfortable placing captions and working with text you don't personally read]



Good eye for pacing, color grading, and on-screen text styling



Fluent in Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar [tell us what you use]



Reliable with deadlines and able to handle revision rounds without friction.



How to apply

Send a short message that includes:



1. Links to 2–3 videos you've edited (any format, any language)



2. At least one example of AI-generated UGC or b-roll you've created [this is required]



3. Which AI tools you currently use for video generation



We believe in rewarding quality. On top of your salary, we pay bonuses for videos that generate strong performance and we recognize content that keeps delivering results weeks or months after it goes live. The better your work performs, the more you earn.

title: Media Buyer - Experience
description:
We're not looking for someone who needs to be taught the basics. We're looking for a Media Buyer who has been in the trenches — who has managed real budgets, built scalable structures from scratch, and has the results to back it up.

About the role

As our Media Buyer, you own the strategy and execution of paid advertising across Meta and Google. You collaborate closely with our creative and strategy teams, but you operate independently. You know what needs to be done, you know why, and you get it done.

This is a hands-on role with significant budget responsibility. You will be expected to hit the ground running.

What you bring



Proven, hands-on experience managing paid campaigns on Meta Ads — you understand campaign architecture, audience strategy, ABO vs CBO, and know the difference between a campaign that converts by chance and one engineered to scale

Strong command of Google Ads across Search, Performance Max and Display — including bid strategies, quality scores and account-level structure

A systematic approach to account building: naming conventions, testing frameworks, campaign hierarchy and documentation

Experience with media planning and scheduling — dayparting, seasonal budget allocation and coordinated campaign launches

The ability to read data, identify what matters and make decisive optimizations without being prompted



What we expect you to demonstrate

We take experience seriously, which means we expect you to show yours. As part of your application, please include:



A concrete example of a campaign or account structure you built — walk us through your approach and the outcome

How you approach media planning and budget scheduling in practice

A brief description of what a well-managed account looks like in your hands



Keep it concise and specific. Results speak louder than job titles.

What we offer



Substantial advertising budgets and full ownership over how they are deployed

The autonomy to build your own systems and set the standard for how paid media is run

A fast-moving team where your work has direct and visible impact

A dedicated budget for training, certifications and industry events

A performance-based bonus structure that rewards results

title: Creative Strategist / Ad Creative
description:
We're not looking for someone who makes things look pretty. We're looking for a creative who thinks like a strategist — someone who understands why an ad stops the scroll, what angle makes someone click, and how to translate that into a creative that actually converts.

About the role

As our Creative, you are responsible for concepting and producing high-performing ad creatives for Meta. You don't just execute — you think. You understand human psychology, you know how to identify the right angle for the right audience, and you know how to bring that to life visually and verbally.

You work closely with our Media Buyer and strategy team to ensure every creative has a clear purpose and is built to perform.

What you bring



Proven experience creating professional ad creatives specifically for
 and Instagram — you have a portfolio that shows it

A deep understanding of angles: you know how to identify the core tension, desire or pain point of an audience and build a creative around it

The ability to concept and produce creatives that go beyond aesthetics — you think in hooks, in emotions, in conversion

Strong experience working with AI tools in your creative process — whether for ideation, image generation, copywriting or production

An eye for what works on Meta specifically: static, video, UGC-style, carousel — you know when to use what and why

The ability to move fast without sacrificing quality



What we expect you to demonstrate

We want to see your work, not just read about it. As part of your application, please include:



A selection of ad creatives you have made that ran on
 or Instagram — share the context, the angle you chose and why

An example of how you used AI in your creative workflow and what it produced

How you think about angles: walk us through how you approach a new brief from angle identification to final creative



Show us how you think, not just what you made.

What we offer



A role where your creatives are actually tested, measured and iterated on — you will see what works

Close collaboration with paid media, so your work is always built in context

Full access to the latest AI tools and the freedom to experiment with them

A fast-moving environment where good ideas move quickly from concept to live

A dedicated budget for courses, tools and industry resources

A performance-based bonus structure tied to creative results

title: VSL Video Editor - Skincare Brand
description:
Summary

We are a rapidly expanding direct-to-consumer (D2C) beauty brand on a mission to help 1 million people achieve healthier, more radiant skin with our premium, science-backed skincare. Our in-house marketing team is one of the most efficient and innovative in the D2C space and we’re looking for a results-oriented Video Editor to help us scale even faster by producing impactful, high-converting ad creatives.

If you thrive in a dynamic environment, love blending storytelling with data, and get excited about creating video ads that directly drive sales, this could be the role for you.



Purpose of the Role

This position is all about turning creative concepts into scroll-stopping, performance-driven video ads for Meta platforms. You won’t just be piecing together footage — you’ll be creating assets that help us grow profitably, reach millions of customers, and make a genuine difference in how people feel about their skin. You’ll work within a fast-moving, highly collaborative remote team that values speed, initiative, and measurable results.



Key Responsibilities

- Edit short-form, conversion-focused video ads for Meta 
 & Instagram)

- Produce multiple variations of each concept for A/B testing

- Transform UGC, product shots, and testimonials into engaging ad creatives

- Source on-trend B-roll and UGC from TikTok, YouTube, and other relevant platforms

- Enhance videos with captions, animations, and AI-powered tools (voiceovers, avatars) when relevant

- Keep up to date with trends on TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Shorts — especially in the beauty niche

- Continuously optimize creatives based on ad performance and team feedback





What We’re Looking For

- 1–2+ years editing performance ads for e-commerce (beauty experience is a bonus)

- Strong skills in Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar software

- Experience adding light animation or motion graphics

- Solid understanding of direct-response marketing and buyer psychology

- Familiar with Meta Ads, UGC ad styles, and
 Ad Library research

- Able to source high-quality clips and content from TikTok, YouTube, and stock platforms

- Organized and comfortable using project management tools like ClickUp

- Reliable workstation, strong internet connection, and efficient file management habits





This Role Won’t Suit You If You:

- Care only about aesthetics and not ad performance

- Need constant guidance and struggle with self-management

- Have no interest in analyzing or improving results based on metrics

- Lack a reliable work setup or juggle too many other commitments

- Can’t adapt quickly to feedback and fast-paced changes

- Only have experience editing social videos for influencers or personal brands





Why You’ll Love Working With Us

- Join a high-performing international team that moves fast and collaborates openly

- Have genuine creative ownership with a clear link to business growth

- Work in a flat, feedback-driven environment without unnecessary bureaucracy

- Enjoy free and discounted skincare products

- Be part of a brand on track to lead its category

- Create content that inspires confidence and improves people’s lives





Ready to Apply?

h t t p s : / / j o b s . a d e l i r a . n l / v i d e o - e d i t o r (remove spaces



Complete the short Typeform (it only takes 5 minutes) — you’ll hear from us within 5 days. We don’t review private messages.

title: Social Media & Content Marketing VA (Full-Time, Bonuses + Growth)
description:
We are an established Australian trade services business looking for a full-time Social Media and Content Marketing VA.



This role is responsible for building and executing a social media strategy across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube. You will audit our existing channels and content library, develop a strategy grounded in real analysis, create and schedule content daily, manage comments and DMs, and report on performance each month. The business owner appears on camera - everything else is yours to own and execute.



If you have worked in digital marketing, content creation, social media management, or at a marketing agency - and you can point to specific accounts you have genuinely grown from a smaller base - we want to hear from you.



==============================



WHAT WE OFFER



* Full-time, stable role with a long-established Australian business

* Starting salary of PHP 33,500 per month during probation, increasing to PHP 35,000 per month after probation

* WE ARE WILLING TO PAY MORE FOR A HIGH-QUALITY, PROVEN CANDIDATE - THE LISTED RATE IS A STARTING POINT

* Additional earning potential through commissions and performance-based bonuses

* Fully remote - work from home

* Flexible hours within Australian timezone

* Long-term role with growing scope over time



==============================



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Audit existing social channels, content, and performance data - identify what is working and what is not

* Build a clear content strategy and present it to the business owner

* Create content daily - graphics, captions, short-form video edits, carousels

* Post consistently across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube

* Coordinate with the owner for his on-camera video appearances - brief him on what is needed and handle everything else

* Respond to all comments and DMs daily across all platforms

* Pre-qualify or redirect social leads to the sales team where appropriate

* Track performance monthly and report clearly to the owner

* Provide content and UX input on two business websites (supporting role)



==============================



REQUIREMENTS



* Demonstrated experience growing social media followings from a smaller base - you must be able to show numbers, not just titles

* Ability to build and articulate a content strategy - not just execute one that already exists

* Strong video editing skills - you will be working with raw phone footage filmed in a single take

* Exceptional written English - captions, comments, and DMs are all public-facing brand touchpoints

* Self-directed and able to make decisions without constant guidance

* Comfortable reading platform analytics and adjusting strategy based on data

* Reliable computer, internet connection, and equipment suitable for video editing



==============================



NICE TO HAVE



* HubSpot or CRM experience

* Experience helping a business owner build a personal brand or thought leadership presence

* Background in service-based businesses - trades, home improvement, or similar

* YouTube channel growth experience (long-form content)

* Digital marketing agency experience



==============================



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* Flexible hours

* Australian timezone (AEST/AEDT)



==============================



If you have built real followings, can back it up with numbers, and want a role where your results are recognised and rewarded - apply now.



==============================



HOW TO APPLY



* Click "APPLY FOR THIS JOB" button on this job post

* Fill in the Subject field (this is required, but it will not affect your application outcome)

* Optionally, you may write a message

* Click Send

* Once your application is submitted, you will receive an
 from us with the next steps and instructions for the hiring process

title: Junior EU Product Compliance specialist
description:
At Instrux, we help companies bring products to market in the right way. That means helping the
et EU product rules, organize the right documents, and make sure everything is in place before a product is sold. We work with both growing companies and established manufacturers, and we turn complex compliance requirements into practical steps.



We are looking for a Junior EU Product Compliance Specialist to support our compliance team. This is a detail-focused role for someone who likes structured work, clear documentation, and professional communication with clients and suppliers.



What you will do



- Draft Declarations of Conformity based on existing information and templates

- Build and organize technical files and product documentation

- Review new customer documents and check whether required information is complete

- Follow up with suppliers and clients to request missing documents or clarifications

- Help maintain clear and well-structured compliance records

- Support senior specialists with project preparation and document handling

- Flag missing information, inconsistencies, or risks in product files





What we are looking for



- Minimal 1 year experience in a position where CE/GPSR was part of the daily operations.

- Strong attention to detail

- Good written English and clear communication

- Comfortable working with documents, lists, and structured processes

- Able to follow instructions carefully and ask questions when something is unclear

- Professional in communication with clients and suppliers

- Interested in EU product compliance, documentation, and regulations

- Able to work independently in a remote environment



Nice to have



- Experience with product documentation, technical files, or quality/compliance work

- Experience working with suppliers or document collection

- Familiarity with CE marking or EU product legislation



Why this role is interesting



This is a great opportunity for someone who wants to build a career in EU compliance. You will learn how product compliance works in real client projects, how technical files are structured, and how to support companies that need to meet EU requirements before selling their products.

title: Construction Plan Estimator (Bluebeam / Groundplan | AU Company | Full Time)
description:
About the Company

Build Clean is a professional construction cleaning company servicing residential and commercial projects across Australia. Our team works closely with builders and contractors to provide high-quality post-construction cleaning services.

We are looking for a Construction Plan Estimator who can read architectural drawings and construction plans to estimate the scope of cleaning work required for each project. Long-term opportunity with a growing Australian company

To confirm you have read the full job post, please include the word “Estimator” in the first line of your application. Applicants who do not follow this instruction may not be considered.

Job Responsibilities

Review architectural drawings, floor plans, elevations, and site plans

Measure and calculate floor areas and building sizes

Analyse residential and commercial construction plans

Prepare job estimates based on building size and project complexity

Use Bluebeam and/or Groundplan to measure areas from plans

Organize estimate data and maintain records

Communicate with the internal team regarding project scope and requirements

Ensure estimates are accurate and completed on time

Required Qualifications

Degree in Architecture, Engineering, Urban Planning, or a related field

Strong ability to read architectural drawings and construction plans

Experience with Groundplan, Bluebeam, or similar plan takeoff software

Experience estimating construction, trades, or building-related projects

Strong attention to detail and analytical skills

Good communication and organizational abilities

System Requirements

To ensure smooth communication and productivity, applicants must have the following:

Reliable computer or laptop capable of running Bluebeam, Groundplan, or similar software

Minimum Processor: Intel i5 (10th gen or higher), AMD Ryzen 5 or higher, or Apple M1 / M2 / M3 chip or newer

Minimum RAM: 8 GB (16 GB preferred for working with large construction drawings)

Stable high-speed internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps recommended)

Dual monitor setup preferred for reviewing construction plans efficiently

Quiet and professional home workspace

Preferred Experience

Experience working with Australian construction drawings

Experience reviewing residential homes, commercial buildings, or shopping centres

Previous experience doing plan takeoffs or construction estimates

Application Instructions

To apply, please answer the following questions in your application.

Screening Questions

What is your degree and field of study?

Do you have experience reading architectural drawings, elevations, and floor plans? Please explain briefly.

What estimating or measurement software have you used? (Bluebeam, Groundplan, PlanSwift, AutoCAD, etc.)

Have you estimated projects related to construction, trades, or building services before? If yes, please describe.

Please describe a project where you had to review construction plans and calculate areas or scope.

Quick Plan Reading Question

To confirm your experience reading construction drawings: When reviewing a floor plan, what are the three main things you check first before calculating the total floor area?

If the elevations don’t visibly show internal glazing, what are 2 ways I could figure out how many glazed (glass) panels are in this specific project?

What are 2 different ways i can figure out what floor surface is on a particular floor plan? 

Important

To confirm you have read the full job post, please include the word “Estimator” in the first line of your application. Applicants who do not follow this instruction may not be considered.

title: Social Media Manager

 (not just general funnel builders)

 automation

title: General Operations Analyst / Assistant Coach (Remote)
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Schedule: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

Timezone: Pacific Time (PT)

Type: Long-term, stable role



About the Role



We are hiring a Full-Time General Operations Analyst / Assistant Coach to support an online fitness coaching business.



This is a behind-the-scenes, execution-focused role that combines:

-Instagram DM operations & lead qualification

-Marketing and funnel analysis

-Assistant coaching tasks (programs + meal plans)



This role requires the ability to pivot throughout the day — during certain parts of the shift, you will be expected to prioritize responding to Instagram DMs and actively nurturing leads in real time, then return to operations and coaching tasks when volume is lower.



This position is best suited for someone who is analytical, detail-oriented, strong with numbers, and comfortable switching contexts while following SOPs.



Key Responsibilities

-Instagram DM Operations & Lead Qualification

-Actively monitor and respond to inbound Instagram DMs during assigned hours

-Follow scripts and SOPs to nurture leads and manage follow-ups

-Vet leads based on qualification criteria (goals, readiness, budget, etc.)

-Route qualified leads to the booking link / sales call

-Track DM activity and performance metrics (response rate, qualified rate, booked calls)

-Identify trends, drop-offs, and opportunities for improvement



Assistant Online Coach Tasks

-Copy and paste existing workout programs for clients

-Adjust weights and progressions for clients performing in the top range

-Create weekly meal plans using pre-made templates

-Customize protein selections based on client preferences (from an existing list)

-Add existing recipes into meal plans (no recipe creation required)



Important Notes

-This is not a client-facing coaching role

-This is not a sales closing role

-Real-time DM responsiveness is required during designated parts of the shift

-All scripts, SOPs, systems, and templates are provided

-Occasional Zoom check-ins with the Head of Operations are required



Requirements

-Fluent English (written and spoken)

-Strong with numbers and basic calculations

-Analytical, organized, and process-driven

-Able to follow SOPs and pivot tasks efficiently

-Comfortable using Instagram, Google Sheets, and structured workflows

-Experience with DM setting, operations, analytics, or fitness programs is a plus (not required)



What We Offer

-Full-time, stable remote position

-Clear systems and expectations

-Long-term growth and leadership potential

-Performance-based responsibility expansion



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with analytics, operations, DM-based work, or fitness-related tasks

3. Tools you’ve used (Instagram, Google Sheets, CRMs, dashboards, etc.)

4. Your expected monthly compensation



Only applicants who follow instructions and can commit to full-time availability will be considered.



Best,

Jeffrey Chi

title: Video Editor
description:
We are a fast-growing eCommerce company looking for a highly skilled AI video editor who specializes in creating direct-response ads using AI tools.



Our ads are produced 100% with AI, so we are specifically looking for editors who are already experienced with tools such as:



• HeyGen

• Seedance

• NanoBanana

• VEO3

• Other advanced AI video generation / AI B-roll tools



This role is focused on producing high-converting ad creatives, primarily for Meta 
 & Instagram).



If you already create ads for supplement brands, beauty brands, or DTC eCommerce companies, you will be a strong fit.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Your job will be to turn scripts into finished ad creatives using AI tools.



For each project you will receive:

• The script

• Creative direction

• Hook ideas

• Visual guidance

• Access to SOPs



Your mission is to execute the videos and make them look premium, engaging, and native to social media.



Typical deliverable per ad concept:



• 6 video concepts

• 3 hook variations per concept

• AI-generated B-roll

• AI-generated actors / scenes when needed

• Clean editing and pacing for high retention



Important Requirements



We are only looking for editors who:



• Already know how to use AI video generation tools

• Have experience creating ads for eCommerce brands

• Understand short-form ad structure (hooks, retention, pacing)

• Can create AI B-roll and AI scenes that feel natural

• Can follow direct-response ad frameworks



Experience with supplement brands or health / beauty products is a big plus.



Application Requirements (MANDATORY)



To be considered, your application must include the following:



The names of the brands you have previously worked with



10 examples of your best ads created entirely with AI



Links to the videos or portfolio



The AI tools you used to create those ads



Important:



The examples must be ads generated primarily with AI (AI actors, AI B-roll, AI scenes, etc.).



We are NOT looking for traditional edited ads or classic UGC edits.



Applications without these elements will not be reviewed.



Nice to Have



Experience working with brands similar to:



• Rosabella

• Resilia

• Other DTC supplement or beauty brands



Understanding of Meta ad creatives and direct-response marketing is highly preferred.



Goal



We are building a long-term creative team capable of producing large volumes of AI-generated ads for multiple products.



If you are experienced with AI video production for eCommerce ads, we would love to see your work.

-$15 USD per video (depending on complexity & experience).

title: Lead Automation Engineer
description:
Job Description:



Role Overview



We are seeking a Lead Automation Engineer to design, implement, and own business-critical automation systems across our technology stack.



This is a senior-level role (5+ years experience) for someone who can independently architect and deploy automation workflows, integrate enterprise systems, and lead automation strategy across CRM, operations, finance, and internal tooling.



The successful candidate will play a foundational role in building and potentially leading our automation function.



Key Responsibilities



1. Automation Architecture & Implementation



Design and implement scalable automation workflows across:

HubSpot

Microsoft Power Platform (Power Automate, Power Apps)

n8n

Zoho (legacy integrations)

Architect event-driven and API-based integrations between systems.

Build automation frameworks that are secure, maintainable, and extensible.

Create reusable automation modules and standardized integration patterns.

2. CRM & Platform Integration



Lead automation design within HubSpot (workflows, custom objects, operations hub, API integrations).

Build advanced flows in Power Automate, including:

HTTP connectors

Custom connectors

Azure-based integrations

Dataverse integrations

Maintain and gradually phase out legacy Zoho automations while ensuring continuity.

Integrate third-party APIs, webhooks, and internal systems.

3. Engineering & Scripting



Develop scripts and backend integrations using:

Python (required)

REST APIs

JSON/XML transformations

Build middleware services where required.

Debug automation failures and implement robust logging and monitoring.

4. Systems Thinking & Process Optimization



Map business processes and convert them into optimized automation pipelines.

Identify bottlenecks and implement automation-driven improvements.

Establish automation governance standards and documentation practices.

5. Leadership & Ownership



Operate independently without supervision.

Provide architectural direction for automation initiatives.

Mentor junior automation engineers (if/when applicable).

Participate in technical decision-making across the broader engineering team.

Required Experience



5–8+ years in automation engineering, integration engineering, or related backend engineering roles.

Proven experience building complex automation systems end-to-end.

Strong experience with:

HubSpot workflows and API integrations

Microsoft Power Automate (advanced usage)

n8n (or similar orchestration tools)

Strong API integration experience.

Strong scripting ability in Python.

Experience working in production environments with live business systems.

Experience handling authentication (OAuth2, API keys, JWT, etc.).

Familiarity with webhooks, RESTful APIs, and system interoperability patterns.

Preferred / Advantageous



Experience with:

Azure Functions

Serverless architectures

Docker

CI/CD for automation pipelines

Experience migrating from Zoho to HubSpot or similar CRM migrations.

Understanding of data structures, schema design, and CRM data modeling.

Experience building internal automation platforms or integration hubs.

Familiarity with GDPR/data protection practices.

This is not a junior or template-based automation role.



We expect someone who can:



Architect before building.

Build without step-by-step supervision.

Debug across systems (CRM + API + database).

Identify edge cases proactively.

Make platform decisions with long-term scalability in mind.

Lead automation initiatives as a domain owner.

Performance Indicators



Reduction in manual processes across departments.

Stability and reliability of automation pipelines.

Time-to-deploy new integrations.

Documentation completeness and maintainability.

Successful migration from Zoho-heavy processes to HubSpot/Power Platform architecture.

Ideal Candidate Profile



Systems thinker.

Technically rigorous.

Comfortable working in evolving startup or scale-up environments.

Able to communicate technical architecture to non-technical stakeholders.

Proactive and solution-oriented.

Job Type: Full-time



Benefits:



Work from home

Work Location: Remote

title: Sales and Admin Coordinator for Australian IT Company
description:

Agile IT Solutions is a friendly and professional IT company that provides IT support, Microsoft 365, cybersecurity, cloud solutions, and business technology advice to clients.



This role includes sales administration, quoting support, billing coordination, CRM updates, client onboarding admin, and general business support. You will help keep enquiries, follow-ups, records, and key admin tasks organised and up to date so nothing gets missed.



You will also assist with preparing information and coordinating meetings for Client Technology/Business Reviews



You’ll be working across systems such as HubSpot, HaloPSA, Zomentum, Xero, and Microsoft 365, helping the team stay organised, responsive, and efficient.



This role suits someone who is detail-focused, reliable, organised, and confident working with systems, checklists, and repeatable processes.

* Sales administration and follow-up support

* Quote and proposal preparation support

* Client onboarding administration

* Organised and reliable

* Confident using online systems and business software

* Able to follow processes and keep tasks moving

* Experience with HubSpot, Xero, HaloPSA, Zomentum, or Microsoft 365 is an advantage

Work Setup:



Full-time remote role

Must have good overlap with Melbourne, Australia business hours

To Apply:

A short introduction about yourself

Your relevant admin or sales support experience

title: AI and Process Automation Specialist
description:
AI & Process Automation Specialist



Company: Pinnacle Logistics Group (Phoenix, AZ - Remote/Philippines-based)

Type: Full-Time

Benefits: 13th Month Pay, Paid Time Off, Claude Enterprise Account (unlimited tokens)

Salary Range: $800-$1200/mo plus 13th month pay





ABOUT US



Pinnacle Logistics Group is a fast-growing, tech-enabled 3PL (third-party logistics) company. We move freight across the US and Mexico - full truckload, LTL, drayage, and ocean. We're a 46-person team with 35 tea
mbers based in the Philippines. 





THE ROLE



We need someone who can observe how our team works day-to-day, identify where time is being wasted on repetitive or manual tasks, and then build the automations that eliminate that waste. You'll shadow employees across different roles, learn their workflows, and design solutions that save them hours every week.



This is NOT a traditional developer role. We don't need someone who spent 10 years writing enterprise Java. We need someone who's resourceful, learns fast, and can take a messy real-world process and turn it into a clean automation - even if they have to teach themselves how along the way.





WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



- Observing tea
mbers across operations, carrier sales, and account management to understand their daily workflows

- Identifying repetitive manual tasks and designing automations that eliminate them

- Building automations using Claude AI (Anthropic), Zapier, 
, and Python/Flask

- Connecting tools like Gmail, Google Chat, Google Drive, CRMs (
), Airtable, and Front

- Using Claude Code and Claude API to build AI-powered workflows

- Parsing
s, auto-posting to chat channels, syncing data between systems

- Setting up webhooks, APIs, and integration pipelines

- Testing, debugging, and maintaining the automations you build

- Reporting on time saved and process improvements





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Strong experience with at least a few of these: Zapier, 
, Python, APIs/webhooks, Claude AI, ChatGPT, or similar AI tools

- Comfortable using Claude Code or similar AI coding assistants to build things quickly

- Can read API documentation and figure out integrations on your own

- Basic scripting ability (Python preferred, but JavaScript/Node.js works too)

- Strong observation and communication skills - you need to understand how people work before you can improve it

- Self-starter mentality - you don't wait to be told what to do, you see a problem and fix it

- Good written and verbal English communication (you'll be working directly with leadership)

- Familiarity with Google Workspace (Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Chat)





BONUS POINTS



- Experience with Flask or any lightweight web framework

- Familiarity with Airtable, Front, 
, or Fireflies.ai

- Any background in logistics, freight, or supply chain

- Experience building MCP servers or working with the Claude API directly

- You've automated something in a previous role and can show us what you built





WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



You won't be stuck in a ticketing queue building someone else's wireframes. You'll work directly with the company leadership on a backlog of automation ideas that directly impact the business. Your job is to watch how our team works, find the bottlenecks, and build the solutions. If you're the kind of person who gets excited about turning a 10-step manual process into zero steps, this is your role.



A word of honesty: If you need someone to tell you what to do or how to do it, this is not the right role for you. We'll give you direction and priorities, but we expect you to figure out the "how" on your own. Google it, ask AI, read the docs, watch a YouTube video - we don't care how you learn it, just that you get it done. The best person for this role is someone who sees a broken process and can't help but fix it.





HOW TO APPLY



1. A short message about why this role excites you

2. Examples of automations or integrations you've built (screenshots, videos, or descriptions are fine)

3. Your experience with AI tools - specifically how you've used them to build or automate something

4. Your expected monthly salary in PHP

title: Appointment Setter - Solar
description:
Solar Appointment Setter — USA Market (Massachusetts)

*Remote | Part-Time | Night Shift*



The Role

We set solar panel appointments for homeowners across Massachusetts, USA — one of the strongest solar markets in the United States.

We need an experienced outbound caller to qualify homeowners and book them in for a free solar survey. You do not sell anything. You call, you qualify, you book. Our sales team handles everything from there.



You will be given warm leads, a power dialler, a proven script, and full training. Everything is set up for you — you just need to show up and dial.



What We Provide

- Pre-qualified lead lists (Massachusetts homeowners, no existing solar)

- Power dialler — fully set up, no tech headaches

- Proven script and objection handling training

- Regular 1:1 performance support from management

- Night shift premium built into your base rate



Your Targets

- Minimum: *15 appointments per month*

- Expected: *20–30 appointments per month*

- Top performers: *30–40+ appointments per month*



Pay

*Base rate: $400 USD per month*



Plus commission on every appointment booked:

| Monthly Appointments | Rate Per Appointment |

| 1 – 20 | $25 |

| 21 – 30 | $28 |

| 31+ | $32 |



*Real earning examples:*



| Sits/month | Base | Commission | Total |

| 15 | $400 | $375 | *$775* |

| 20 | $400 | $500 | *$900* |

| 30 | $400 | $790 | *$1,190* |

| 40 | $400 | $1,112 | *$1,512* |



Schedule

Monday to Friday, Eastern Standard Time business hours.

This means *approximately 9pm to 5am Philippine time.* This is a night shift role. The $400 base reflects this. Please only apply if you are genuinely comfortable working overnight hours consistently.



Requirements

- Minimum 1 year outbound cold calling or appointment setting experience

- Excellent spoken English — clear, confident, natural on the phone

- Neutral or American-leaning accent preferred

- Power dialler experience (Mojo, CallTools, VICI, or similar)

- Quiet dedicated home office, quality headset, stable internet connection

- Able to commit to full Monday–Friday schedule

- Resilient and target-driven — you understand cold calling is a numbers game



Preferred But Not Essential

- Experience calling US homeowners

- Solar, energy, or home improvement background

- Knowledge of TCPA compliance and US calling regulations



How to Apply

Please send:

- A voice recording of 60–90 seconds — introduce yourself and give us your best opening line for a solar cold call to a US homeowner

- A brief summary of your cold calling experience and any metrics (dials per day, appointments set per week)



We are a fast-growing remote appointment setting operation. Strong performers will have the opportunity to take on additional markets and move into senior roles as the team expands.
