title: Local SEO Specialist + Website Editor (Framer)
description:
Local SEO Specialist + Website Editor (Framer)



Entertainment Agency | $7–$8 USD/hr | 10–15 hrs per week



About Us



We are a Melbourne-based entertainment agency providing performers and event experiences for private functions, parties, and corporate events.



Our website is already established, however our Google search optimisation is not fully complete, and we are looking for an experienced SEO specialist to properly structure and optimise the site.



Our goal is to improve local search visibility, Google rankings, and booking enquiries from organic search traffic.



Our website is built using Framer, so applicants must be comfortable editing and implementing SEO changes inside Framer.



?



Role Overview



We are looking for someone who can both plan and implement SEO improvements, not just provide reports.



You will work directly on the website to improve search visibility and complete the optimisation work that has not yet been fully implemented.



This role focuses on local SEO and search performance in Melbourne and surrounding areas.



?



Hours & Pay



First 3 months:

• 15 hours per week

• $7–$8 USD per hour



After the first 3 months (ongoing for 6-12 months +):

• 10 hours per week

• Same hourly rate



This role is ongoing if results and communication are strong.



?



Responsibilities



• Perform a full SEO audit of the website

• Complete the remaining Google search optimisation work

• Keyword research focused on Melbourne and surrounding suburbs

• On-page optimisation (meta titles, descriptions, headings, alt text)

• Create and optimise location-based landing pages

• Improve internal linking structure

• Implement structured data where relevant

• Optimise Google Business Profile visibility

• Build Australian business citations and directories

• Analyse competitor search strategies

• Track keyword rankings and organic search growth

• Provide simple monthly updates on progress



Tools such as Google Search Console, GA4, Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar may be used to monitor performance.



?



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



• Proven experience with Local SEO for service-based businesses

• Must know how to work inside Framer and implement SEO changes directly on the website

• Experience improving Google search rankings and Maps visibility

• Strong understanding of keyword research and search intent

• Strong written English for editing website pages

• Ability to clearly explain what work is being done and why



?



Important – Please Read



We are not looking for sales pitches or SEO packages.



We are hiring someone to do the SEO work, not sell services.



Do not apply if you:



• Send sales messages or SEO packages

• Send agency presentations or generic proposals

• Cannot show real results from past SEO work



Applications that ignore these instructions will not be considered.



?



How to Apply



Please send one recent SEO project from the last 12 months where you personally handled the work.



Include:

	1.	Website URL

	2.	Primary keywords targeted

	3.	Ranking position before you started

	4.	Current ranking position

	5.	Screenshot of organic traffic or ranking improvement

	6.	Bullet points explaining what you personally implemented



If you cannot provide before-and-after data, please do not apply.

description:
Hello, my name is Yakub Saputra, founder of Kubistra Music.



I run an online jazz education business that helps musicians from around the world understand jazz more deeply and actually apply it in their playing. We’ve built an audience of over 31,000 followers on Instagram, an
 list of over 9,000 subscribers, and we’ve served more than 1,000 students through our programs.



We are currently looking for a highly skilled video editor to build a long-term working relationship with as our in-house video editor for Kubistra Music.



I personally has been editing all my videos, but now it’s time to get somebody better than me to take over.



We are specifically looking for someone who is well-versed in CapCut and Final Cut Pro (or DaVinci Resolve), and who can create edits that match the style, quality, and energy of our existing top-performing videos. And create an even better, innovative and effective video in the future.  



Your work will mainly require these skill sets:



1. High-level video editing for short-form reels, long-form YouTube videos, and sales videos

2. Strong motion graphics and animation skills, with the ability to create visuals that are consistent with the Kubistra Music brand

3. Repurposing content effectively across formats, along with thumbnail design that fits our visual style and improves performance

4. Understanding of music and jazz is a **major plus. But not required.**



We are looking for someone who is reliable, communicates clearly in English, works with fast turnaround times, pays close attention to detail, and takes feedback well.



You will need to understand the voice, teaching style, personality, and creative direction behind Kubistra Music, and be able to translate that into edits that feel aligned with the brand.



If you feel you are a good fit for this role, please watch this quick video with **instructions on how to apply**: 



I only review applications from people who pay close attention to detail, and I will not review your application unless you watch that video first.



I look forward to hearing from you, and I’m excited to potentially work together.



Best of Luck,

Yakub Saputra

title: AI Image Prompt Specialist - Realistic Human Fashion (Simulated Clothing Shoots)
description:
We’re looking for a highly detail-oriented AI Image Prompt Specialist to generate realistic human fashion images for simulated clothing shoots (e-commerce style). Your job is to consistently produce outputs that look like real photos that are not “AI-looking” and to refine prompts until results meet our realism and brand standards.



You’ll be trained on our realism rules (how to avoid common AI artifacts and unrealistic outputs). But you must already be excellent at prompt writing, iterative refinement, and visual QA.



What You’ll Do



- Generate realistic human model images for clothing/product presentations (studio + lifestyle concepts)

- Write and refine prompts to:



- Keep humans anatomically correct (hands, faces, body proportions, posture)

- Ensure realistic fabric behavior (drape, folds, seams, tension points, thickness)

- Maintain clean product visibility (logos, prints, stitching, garment shape)

- Match lighting, camera lens feel, and consistent “photoshoot” aesthetics

- Run multiple iterations quickly, compare outputs, and select the best

- Apply consistent standards for realism and brand look

- Track prompt versions and what changed (so we can improve repeatability)

- Follow internal guidelines to reduce AI artifacts and “uncanny” results



Requirements (Must-Have)



- Proven experience generating photorealistic AI images of humans

- Strong prompt engineering skills: composition, lighting, camera settings, styling, negative prompts, refinement loops

- Sharp eye for detail and realism (you notice small issues quickly)

- Able to match a reference style and keep outputs consistent

- Excellent English comprehension for instructions and feedback

- Reliable communication + ability to deliver daily/weekly output targets



Nice-to-Have



- Fashion/e-commerce/photography background (styling, lighting, posing, editorial vs product shooting)

- Experience with consistent character/model workflows

- Experience building “prompt recipes” / reusable prompt frameworks

- Basic understanding of garment construction (seams, collars, cuffs, hems)



How We’ll Work



We’ll provide:

- Clothing references / creative direction

- Our realism checklist + training on what to avoid

- Feedback loops to improve consistency



You deliver:

- A set of usable images per product/concept

- The prompts used + notes on what you changed between iterations



To Apply Please include:

1. Your portfolio/examples (especially realistic humans + fashion)

2. The AI tools/workflows you use (and why)

3. A short note: your process for fixing common realism issues (hands, faces, fabric, lighting)

4. Your availability + expected hourly rate



If you’re the kind of person who can make AI images look like they came from a real camera and you’re obsessive about realism we want to work with you.

title: Full-Time Real Estate Research & Data Operations VA (Airbnb/Zillow/HubSpot + Phone Calls)
description:
We are hiring a full-time Real Estate Research & Data Operations VA to work Monday–Friday, 9AM–6PM EST.

You will follow detailed SOPs to research vacation rental communities, apartment communities, and real estate opportunities, then enter all data accurately into HubSpot.



This role includes research, calls, follow-ups, SMS,
 outreach, CRM updates, and property analysis.

Training, scripts, SOPs, videos, and tools will all be provided.



Your Responsibilities:

You will be trained to perform all tasks in our SOPs, including:



???? Vacation Rental Communities Research (Airbnb)

- Search for Airbnb communities that meet specific criteria

- Identify 5 comparable Airbnb listings

- Find community address, name, policies, requirements

- Record all data into HubSpot accurately (company + contact records)



???? Apartment Community Research (Zillow)

- Identify multi-unit rental communities

- Save and document all required information

- Research community websites, leasing offices, contact details

- Record everything into HubSpot



???? Phone Calls & Communication

- Call leasing offices to collect missing information

- Use our scripts for long-term leasing partnership inquiries

- Ask questions, take notes, and update HubSpot

- Send
s & follow-ups using our templates



???? General Admin & Data Tasks

- Google Sheets data entry

- HubSpot updates (contacts, companies, tasks, statuses)

- Following up via SMS,
, and phone

- Basic research outside of SOPs

- Learning and executing future SOP expansions as assigned





What We’re Looking For:

- Excellent English (BPO level) — MUST be confident speaking on the phone

- Strong research & analytical skills

- Very detail-oriented and organized

- Fast learner, follows instructions exactly

- Comfortable using multiple tools, tabs, CRM, websites

- Stable internet, quiet workspace for calls

- Dependable, full-time availability during 9AM–6PM EST



Tools You Will Use:

Airbnb

Zillow

HubSpot CRM

Google Maps

Google Sheets

Timeproof (required)

Google Chrome

All scripts, SOPs, templates, login info, and training will be provided.



Work Schedule:



Full-time, Monday–Friday

9:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST (Florida Time)



Salary & Growth:



We offer a structured, guaranteed salary increase schedule:

$2.00/hour for the first 2 weeks (training)

$3.00/hour for the next 2 months

$3.50/hour for the next 3 months

$4.00/hour ongoing afterward



Paid every 2 weeks via PayPal.

Timeproof is required



We promote long-term growth, consistency, and stability.



How to Apply:



Please upload a short voice recording introducing yourself and explaining why you are a good fit for a phone-research role.



Also include:



1. Your work experience related to research or real estate

2. Your English speaking experience

3. Confirm your availability for 9AM–6PM EST



Only applicants who follow these instructions will be considered.

title: Remote HR and Operations Assistant (1-Year Contract)
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Remote HR and Operations Assistant to support our team during a one-year staff leave coverage. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working in a dynamic environment and supporting multiple areas of operations, including recruitment, onboarding, administrative coordination, and finance documentation.

The position will play an important role in helping us identify and recruit qualified tutors and staff, while also supporting the smooth operation of our administrative and financial processes.



***To apply, please include the LINK to your RESUME***



Key Responsibilities

Human Resources and Recruitment (Approximately 50%)

1. Post job openings on recruitment platforms and manage incoming applications

2. Screen candidates and organize applicant information

3. Coordinate interviews and communicate with candidates throughout the hiring process

4. Assist with preparing offer letters and onboarding documentation

5. Help develop and maintain a strong pipeline of tutors and potential staff members



Administrative and Finance Support (Approximately 50%)

1. Provide administrative support including document organization and record keeping

2. Assist with internal coordination and operational paperwork

3. Support finance-related documentation such as invoices, reports, and internal records

4. Maintain organized digital filing systems and documentation



Qualifications

* Experience in HR, recruitment, administration, or operational support is preferred

* Experience working with international companies is a plus

* Strong organizational skills and high attention to detail

* Excellent written communication skills

* Ability to work independently in a remote environment and manage multiple tasks

* Proficiency with Google Workspace, spreadsheets, and online collaboration tools



Contract Details

Fully remote position, 1-year contract (temporary coverage)

Opportunity for the role to evolve into ongoing HR recruitment support depending on performance and organizational needs

title: Full-Time Video Editor (For Short-form Content)
description:
If you love editing engaging TikToks/Instagram Reels, this is the perfect role for you! 



We’re looking for a full-time video editor to join our fast-growing team and help create content that generates millions of views on social media every month.



==About Us==



Flowlync is a social media marketing agency that helps business owners grow their personal brands online and grow their business. We handle the full content production process from ideation to editing and posting. 



We’re growing quickly and are looking for talented editors who want to be part of a high-performance team and grow within the company long-term. 



==What You’ll Be Doing==



As a Video Editor, you will:



• Edit short-form talking-head videos for social media (TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts)

• Turn raw recordings from clients into engaging edited videos

• Work with clear daily deadlines and deliverables

• Manage editing for a set group of clients

• Collaborate with our team to improve content performance



==Requirements==



To be considered, you must:



• Be available full-time (40 hours per week)

• Work exclusively with our company

• Have at least 2 years of short-form video editing experience

• Be fluent in written and spoken English

• Use Adobe Premiere Pro

• Have reliable internet (minimum 200 Mbps)

• Comfortable using Google Drive 

• Fast computer to ensure fast export times and smooth editing 



==What We’re Looking For==



You will be a GREAT fit if you:



• Have a strong sense of what makes content go viral on social media

• Are creative and detail-oriented

• Take ownership of your work and deadlines

• Are organized and proactive

• Constantly look for ways to improve your edits

• Open to feedback and growing your skills



==How To Apply For This Role===



Please fill out this application form:



Important: We will only review applications submitted through the above form. If you don't complete the form, we will not see your application.

title: Executive Strategy & Communications Manager
description:
NOTE: WE WILL ONLY CONSIDER APPLICATIONS WITH AN UPDATED CV AND A 1-MINUTE VIDEO INTRODUCTION!



ROLE OVERVIEW

The Executive Strategy & Communications Manager serves as the CEO’s right hand and primary support partner across personal, legal, entity, contract, and portfolio coordination functions.

This role blends high-level executive support with corporate governance management, contract lifecycle coordination, portfolio tracking, and finance operations assistance related specifically to lending activities. The position requires exceptional discretion, precision, follow-through, and the ability to manage both strategic and administrative matters seamlessly.



Above all, this role exists to protect the CEO’s time, ensure organizational clarity, and maintain clean, audit-ready corporate and contract records across all controlled entities.



1. Executive & Personal Support (Primary Function)

• Manage CEO’s
, meetings, travel, and strategic scheduling priorities

• Coordinate agendas, prepare briefing materials, and track follow-ups

• Attend meetings when needed and capture structured action items

• Monitor inbox and draft professional correspondence

• Maintain a master action tracker for CEO initiatives

• Handle confidential business and personal matters with discretion

• Assist with personal scheduling, medical coordination, travel logistics, and priority reminders

• Coordinate special projects and strategic initiatives directly with the CEO



2. Corporate Governance & Entity Management

• Maintain complete digital Corporate Record Books for all entities

• Draft and archive written consents, board/member resolutions, officer appointments, and banking authority documents

• Maintain governance and compliance calendars (annual reports, registered agents, state filings)

• Coordinate DocuSign / signature workflows

• Maintain and update the Master Entity Matrix

• Reconcile historical entity records, amendments, restructures, and domestications

• Support Delaware formations, domestications, and foreign qualifications as directed

• Ensure all entities remain clean, compliant, and audit-ready

• Does not provide outside legal advice or litigation drafting



3. Contract Management & Legal Coordination

• Maintain centralized Contract Register

• Draft and standardize Service Agreements, Management Agreements, NDAs, Contractor Agreements, and Intercompany Agreements

• Track contract renewals, termination windows, and obligations

• Manage contract version control

• Flag contracts requiring outside counsel review

• Organize legacy contracts and align them with current entity structures

• Track key risk exposure items and report to CEO



4. Portfolio & Strategic Coordination

• Maintain oversight tracking across all controlled entities and investments

• Track entity ownership, structure, and intercompany relationships

• Support asset tracking and title coordination (real estate or investment holdings)

• Maintain summary dashboards for CEO visibility

• Assist with restructuring documentation when portfolio changes occur



5. Finance Operations Assistance (Lending & Capital Support Only)

• Assist CEO with preparation of mortgage, refinance, and business loan applications

• Compile and organize required documentation for lenders (entity documents, contracts, financial statements provided by CEO)

• Track loan application timelines, conditions, and lender follow-ups

• Coordinate communications with banks, lenders, and brokers as directed

• Maintain organized digital files of lending documents and executed loan packages

• This role does NOT review, manage, or oversee company accounting records or bookkeeping functions



6. Documentation & Systems Hygiene

• Maintain structured digital filing systems

• Enforce naming conventions and document control standards

• Maintain SOP documentation for governance and contract processes

• Ensure retrievability of documents within minutes



SUCCESS METRICS

• CEO inbox and calendar remain controlled and organized

• All entities have clean, current governance records

• No missed filing deadlines

• Contract register fully accurate and up to date

• All corporate documents retrievable within minutes

• Lending applications submitted accurately and efficiently

• CEO time protected and priorities executed efficiently

title: Virtual Assistant – Property Claims Coordinator (Australian Insurance)
description:
Virtual Assistant – Property Claims Coordinator (Australian Insurance)



???? Remote (Philippines-Based)

???? Full-Time | Work From Home | AU Hours (Sydney Time)



About Us



We are a fast-growing Australian Building & Insurance Restoration company specialising in residential property claims. We work closely with insurers, adjusters, and homeowners to deliver high-quality restoration and building outcomes.



As we continue to scale nationally, we are seeking a high-performing Virtual Assistant / Claims Coordinator based in the Philippines to support our operations team.



About the Role



This is a critical coordination role supporting the end-to-end lifecycle of insurance claims. You will be responsible for managing workflows, liaising with stakeholders, and ensuring claims are processed efficiently and in line with Australian insurer requirements.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and coordinate residential insurance claims from intake through to completion



Process and update jobs via platforms such as Blueprint and/or Salesforce



Schedule technicians, assessors, and trades



Prepare and submit reports, scopes of works, and estimates



Communicate with insurers, adjusters, contractors, and internal teams



Monitor SLAs, job progress, and compliance requirements



Maintain accurate records, notes, and documentation



Assist with invoicing, variations, and claim updates



Mandatory Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



Proven experience in Australian residential insurance claims (essential)



Strong working knowledge of Blueprint and/or Salesforce



Experience working with builders, restoration companies, or insurance networks



Excellent written and spoken English (clear, professional, articulate)



Strong understanding of claims processes, scopes, and reporting



Preferred Experience



Background in restoration, construction, or insurance building



Familiarity with IICRC processes, make safe, and restoration workflows



Experience handling multiple claims simultaneously in a fast-paced environment



Key Attributes



Highly organised with strong attention to detail



Able to work under pressure and meet strict deadlines



Proactive, solutions-focused, and accountable



Strong communication and stakeholder management skills



Fast learner with the ability to adapt to new systems and processes



Technical Requirements



Reliable high-speed internet (with backup connection mandatory)



Quiet, professional work-from-home setup



Ability to work 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Sydney time



What We Offer



Long-term, stable role with a growing Australian company



Competitive salary based on experience



Opportunity to grow into senior coordination or operations roles



Supportive, fast-paced, and professional team environment



How to Apply



Please submit:



Your resume (with relevant Australian insurance experience)



A short cover letter outlining your experience with Blueprint/Salesforce and property claims



Examples of claims or projects you have managed (if available)



If you have direct experience in Australian insurance claims and know how to operate within insurer systems, we want to hear from you.

title: Virtual Administrative Assistant  (NDIS & Allied Health – Australia)
description:
ABOUT US:



We are an Australian NDIS-registered allied health provider seeking a highly organised and detail-oriented Virtual Administrative Assistant to support the General Manager and clinical team. Due to the nature of our work, accuracy and attention to detail are extremely important.



ABOUT THE ROLE:



You will work directly with the General Manager to reduce administrative pressure and improve workflow systems.

This is not a phone-based role. It is a structured administrative and documentation-focused position requiring strong written English and high attention to detail.



This is a long-term opportunity within a growing healthcare practice. During the initial training period (typically the first few weeks), the role will start at approximately 20 hours per week before increasing to 40 hours per week once the candidate is comfortable with the systems and workflow. Availability should be aligned with Australian Eastern Standard Time (Sydney).



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



• Draft and manage professional
 communication with the clinical team, clients, Support Coordinators and other stakeholders

• Monitor inboxes daily, prioritise urgent matters, and escalate when required

• Draft documents using structured templates, such as Service Agreements and invoices

• Track incoming referrals and follow up on outstanding invoices 

• To confirm you have read this job description carefully, please include the phrase "Halaxy Admin" in the subject line of your application

• Confirm relevant information such as funding availability and NDIA endorsement prior to commencement of services

• Track participant funding utilisation, including plan start and end dates

• Create and maintain client profiles within Halaxy practice management software



Accuracy is critical — small errors in funding categories or plan dates can create compliance issues.



HOW TO APPLY:



Due to the high volume of applications, only candidates who follow the application instructions carefully will be considered. Please
 
 and include:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. A summary of your administrative experience

3. Confirmation that you are comfortable with the rate of USD $5 per hour

4. Your internet speed

5. A screenshot of your workspace

6. A short writing sample drafting a professional
 confirming receipt of an NDIS referral

title: Instagram DM Outreach Specialist – Capture Park (Video Agency)
description:
Capture Park is a short-form video agency based in Riverside, California. 

Our founder Roger built 300K+ YouTube subscribers and 500K+ combined 

followers from scratch with $0 in paid ads under the creator 
 now build that same content system for Inland Empire 

local businesses. We have 2 active paying clients with real results — 

and we're growing.



Here's why this role is an easy sell: only about 30% of local businesses 

use video at all, so most prospects already know they're behind. You're 

not convincing anyone that video matters. You're simply showing them 

that someone local, proven, and credible can do it for them. When a 

prospect 
 on YouTube, they find 300K real subscribers 

built organically. The credibility does the heavy lifting — your job is 

just to start the conversation.



WHO YOU'LL BE REACHING OUT TO:

- Med spas and aesthetics clinics — one new client covers the retainer 

  in a single visit

- Cosmetic dentists and orthodontists — one case pays for months of 

  the retainer

- Gyms, martial arts studios, and fitness centers — we already work 

  with a local martial arts academy, giving you a same-niche case study 

  to reference

- HVAC, roofing, and home service companies — average job is 

  $7,500–$9,500 and almost none of them are doing consistent video

- Auto detailing and ceramic coating shops — before/after content is 

  dominating TikTok right now and these owners know it



You will receive exact scripts and talking points for each niche. 

You do not need to know the pitch math or understand video production. 

Your only job is to get prospects curious enough to book a free 

15-minute call. Everything after that is handled.



WHAT YOU WILL DO EVERY DAY:

- Research local Inland Empire businesses in the target niches using 

  Instagram, Google Maps, and Yelp

- Send 100 personalized cold DMs per day using provided scripts

- Add one specific personalization line to each message based on 

  something real about that business — a recent post, a service 

  they offer, something you noticed

- Follow up with non-responding prospects on a set schedule

- Book interested prospects into a Calendly calendar

- Update a shared Google Sheet tracking log every single day

- Send a short daily report: DMs sent, responses received, calls booked



You will NOT be closing sales, creating content, or managing 

any social media pages.



HOW PAY WORKS:

- $300/month base — paid every Friday ($75/week) via Wise or PayPal

- $15 bonus for every prospect who shows up to a scheduled call

- $100 bonus for every client who signs and pays

- Show-up bonuses accumulate and are paid out together the next 

  time a client pays — within 7 days of that payment clearing



EXAMPLE: If you generate 8 show-ups and 1 of them becomes a paying 

client, you receive (8 x $15) + $100 = $220 in bonuses on top of 

your regular weekly base pay. Credits never expire.



WHY THIS ROLE IS WORTH YOUR TIME:

- You are representing a creator with 500K+ followers — prospects 

  can verify the credibility instantly before they even reply

- There are already 2 paying local clients with real results 

  you can reference in conversations

- Full scripts, niche-specific talking points, and training are 

  provided from day one — you are never figuring this out alone

- Base pay hits your account every Friday without fail

- This is a long-term role with real growth potential as the 

  agency scales

- You never have to close anyone — just get warm, interested 

  people onto a calendar



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

- Strong written English — messages must sound natural and 

  conversational, not copy-pasted

- Real experience with cold outreach, lead generation, or 

  appointment setting

- Organized and reliable — submitting daily tracking is 

  non-negotiable

- Available to work 4–5 focused hours per day consistently

- Comfortable navigating Instagram



TO APPLY — your message must include all 3 of the following 

or it will not be reviewed:



1. Walk through your exact step-by-step process for sending 

   100 personalized DMs in a single day. Be specific.



2. Share a real result from past outreach work — what were 

   you promoting, how many messages did you send, and what 

   was the outcome?



3. Write a cold DM pitching Capture Park's video services to 

   a Riverside med spa called "Glow Aesthetics." Keep it under 

   5 sentences. Visit 
 before writing it.



Applications that skip any of these three will not receive 

a response. We take the hiring process seriously because 

this is a serious long-term role.

title: n8n automation expert needed - WhatsApp customer service bot with AI
description:
We're building a WhatsApp-based customer service bot for a growing e-commerce brand. Looking for a skilled n8n developer to design, build, and document the automation workflow end-to-end.



What you'll build

An n8n workflow that receives incoming WhatsApp messages via webhook and routes them intelligently using greenAPI or Twilio



Integration with the Anthropic Claude API to generate smart, context-aware replies based on a custom system prompt we provide



A status-based routing system: bot handles messages automatically unless a human-agent flag is set, at which point the bot steps back



Clean documentation so we can maintain and extend the workflow ourselves after handoff

title: Virtual Assistant (Social Media, Research, Content Ideas)
description:
We are looking for a smart and reliable assistant to help with research, organizing information, and social media content planning.



Experience is not required.

What matters more is curiosity, common sense, and ability to learn quickly.



This role is good for someone who enjoys:

• researching ideas

• organizing information

• finding inspiration for content

• working with Instagram,
, and TikTok

• planning social media posts

• communicating clearly and giving directions when needed



You will help with things like:

• researching content ideas and examples

• organizing content plans and information

• finding inspiration for Instagram posts, reels, and social media content

• helping plan posts for Instagram,
, and TikTok

• communicating with clients to collect photos, videos, and information needed for content

• clearly explaining to clients what materials they need to send (photos, videos, etc.)

• assisting with basic operations tasks



You do not need design or editing experience.

What matters more is being able to think clearly, communicate directly, and stay organized.



Salary:

?30,000 – ?45,000 per month

Depending on hours, performance, and responsibilities.

Part time or full time arrangements are possible.



Hiring Process

We try to keep the process simple and fair.

1. Apply for the job

2. If your application looks good, we will send you:

• a short test assignment

• a link to schedule your interview

3. You complete the assignment before the interview

4. During the interview we review your thinking process



Completing the assignment guarantees your interview.

The assignment is short and usually takes about 20–30 minutes.



Important

To show that you read this job post, start your application with "Content Plan"

Applications without this will be ignored.



If you enjoy figuring things out, researching ideas, planning content, and working with social media, this could be a great role for you.



We look forward to meeting you.

description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About the Role



We're building a standalone AI-powered Sales Coaching Platform that analyzes sales conversations across multiple channels 
, SMS, phone, video calls) and provides real-time, actionable coaching to sales reps and managers.

A working prototype exists as a Vue.js component. Your job is to transform this into a full-featured SaaS product with dashboards, automated triggers, historical analytics, and team management.



Key Responsibilities



Architect and build a standalone AI Sales Coach application from existing prototype

Design backend services for conversation ingestion, AI analysis, and reporting

Build manager/rep dashboards with performance metrics and trends

Optimize AI prompts and scoring algorithms for sales conversation analysis

Integrate with GoHighLevel, Google Meet, Recall.ai and Twilio



Required Skills

Must-Have:



Vue.js (2 or 3) or React, TypeScript, state management (Vuex/Pinia/Redux)

Node.js/Express or Laravel/PHP, RESTful API design

PostgreSQL or MySQL, query optimization

GitHub Copilot and/or Claude for AI-assisted development workflows

OpenAI/Claude API integration, prompt engineering

GCP or AWS (Cloud Functions, PubSub, Cloud Run)

OAuth 2.0, webhook handling, third-party API consumption



Strongly Preferred:



Experience with conversation analytics or speech-to-text systems

Background in sales tech (CRM, sales engagement platforms)

Queue/job processing (Redis, RabbitMQ)

Real-time systems (WebSockets)

CI/CD pipelines, Docker



Nice-to-Have:



GoHighLevel API experience

Video/audio transcription services (AssemblyAI, Deepgram)



Technical Environment

AI: OpenAI GPT via custom proxy

Cloud: Google Cloud Platform

Integrations: GoHighLevel, Google Workspace

About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering high-quality property maintenance and electrical solutions has made us a trusted partner for residential, commercial, and industrial clients nationwide. With decades of experience in electrical systems, installations, and maintenance, we take pride in our technical expertise and craftsmanship—ensuring our clients’ properties remain safe, efficient, and fully compliant with modern standards.



Role Overview



We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Electrical Engineer to join our team. This role involves electrical design, project coordination, system analysis, and technical documentation. The successful candidate will work closely with project managers, site teams, and clients to ensure accurate planning, safe installations, and seamless execution of all electrical works—from concept design to project completion.



Key Responsibilities

Electrical Engineering & Design



Electrical System Design: Develop, review, and interpret electrical plans, schematics, and load calculations.

Technical Specifications: Prepare detailed specifications, diagrams, SLDs (single-line diagrams), and layout drawings.

Material & Equipment Selection: Determine appropriate electrical components, materials, and equipment required for projects.

Compliance & Standards: Ensure designs meet electrical codes, safety standards, and regulatory requirements.



Project Coordination & Client Management



Site Coordination: Work with contractors, site engineers, and electricians to ensure proper installation and site execution.

Client Communication: Liaise with clients to clarify requirements, provide technical updates, and explain engineering decisions.

Documentation: Prepare project reports, progress updates, testing results, QA/QC records, and risk assessments.

Change Management: Document revisions to electrical plans and update load calculations, cost impacts, and schedules accordingly.



Testing, Maintenance & Quality Control



System Testing: Perform testing, commissioning, and troubleshooting of electrical systems and equipment.

Preventive Maintenance: Evaluate system performance and recommend maintenance schedules or upgrades.

Cost Estimation: Prepare electrical cost estimates, material take-offs, and assist in budget planning.

description:
Please refer to the application instructions at the bottom.



We are seeking a highly analytical, creative, and results-driven
 Ads Specialist to join our growing marketing team. This role plays a critical part in generating high-quality leads, scaling campaigns, optimizing ad performance, and ensuring strong ROI across Meta platforms.



The ideal candidate has deep experience in paid social advertising, strong understanding of audience targeting, and proven ability to manage full-funnel
 ad campaigns. You must be able to analyze insights, adjust strategies quickly, and communicate performance clearly to management and clients.



This position requires someone data-driven, strategic, and capable of executing high-performing ad campaigns with accuracy, creativity, and best-practice methodology.



Key Responsibilities

Campaign Strategy & Planning



Develop effective
 and Instagram advertising strategies based on client goals

Create campaign structures including TOF/MOF/BOF funnels

Perform competitor analysis and market research to identify opportunities

Define audience segments, interest targeting, and lookalike audiences

Plan budgets, bidding strategies, and campaign pacing



Campaign Execution & Optimization



Set up, launch, and manage paid campaigns inside Meta Ads Manager

Write compelling ad copy and collaborate on creatives (images, videos, UGC)

Test variations through A/B testing (copy, creatives, targeting, placements)

Monitor daily campaign performance and adjust strategies for highest ROI

Optimize ads for lower CPA, higher ROAS, and better quality leads

Troubleshoot performance drops, delivery issues, and disapproved ads



Tracking, Analytics & Reporting



Implement and verify Meta Pixel, API Conversion, and event tracking

Analyze data to identify trends, bottlenecks, and optimization opportunities

Prepare weekly, monthly, and quarterly performance reports

Track KPIs such as CTR, CPC, CPM, ROAS, CPA, Quality Score, and conversions

Provide actionable recommendations based on insights and performance results



Client Communication & Coordination



Communicate campaign progress, results, and strategic recommendations

Gather client inputs, understand objectives, and propose solutions

Work alongside creative, content, and sales teams to align messaging

Provide guidance on landing page improvements for conversion growth



Compliance, Testing & Quality Control



Ensure all ads comply with Meta’s advertising policies

Maintain organized documentation of ad sets, targeting, and experiments

Conduct regular audits of campaigns, audiences, and tracking setups

Maintain accuracy of all dashboards, naming conventions, and campaign files

Continuously research industry changes, algorithm updates, and best practices



Required Skills & Experience

Essential Qualifications

title: Virtual Assistant / Social Media Manager (Remote)
description:
Job Title

Virtual Assistant and Social Media Manager



About the Company

We are a fast growing real estate media business serving Northern California. We deliver high quality photos, videos and marketing content for real estate agents. We are looking for a reliable right hand person who will help run day to day operations behind the scenes and support our clients with professionalism and speed.



Job Overview

This is a long term remote position for someone who is highly organized, proactive and comfortable managing many tasks throughout the day. You will be responsible for scheduling, client communication, photo quality checks, media delivery, social media management and client outreach. You will play a major role in keeping the business running smoothly.



Key Responsibilities

- Schedule real estate photo and video shoots with clients

- Coordinate and manage project timelines and bookings

- Review photo and video quality before delivery

- Deliver photo and video files to clients through our systems

- Respond to client inquiries with professionalism and timely

- Manage and grow social media accounts on Instagram and Facebook

- Create simple reels stories and post layouts using Canva

- Write clean captions and conduct basic hashtag research

- Plan and schedule weekly social media content

- Reach out to potential clients through direct messages emails or phone calls

- Track and organize invoices payments and bookings

- Maintain confidentiality of client information

- Follow quality standards and brand guidelines

- Assist with additional administrative tasks as needed



Daily Expectations

- Respond quickly to messages during work hours

- Prioritize urgent client needs

- Meet daily outreach goals for new potential clients

- Maintain accuracy in scheduling and media delivery

- Keep media organized with consistent naming and folder systems



Required Skills

- Proficiency with computers, social media,  and cloud tools: google systems, instagram, Facebook, etc.

- Experience with Adobe Premiere Pro Adobe Lightroom and Adobe Photoshop

- Experience with Canva or similar design tools

- Strong attention to detail

- Strong organizational and time management skills

- Excellent written and verbal communication

- Familiarity with real estate media

- Ability to create simple social media content

- Tech savvy and quick to learn new software

- Friendly professional and proactive attitude

- Fluent in English

- Experience in sales or client outreach



Preferred Experience/Skills

- CRM or project management tools such as Trello or Asana

- Previous experience with a photo or media business

- Someone Loyal, dependable, coachable & a self starter



Position Details

- Remote

- Work from home

- Hours of operation: 06:00 AM PST to 3:30 PM PST, 30 minute lunch break

- Must be available during Pacific Standard Time

- Must have your own reliable high performing computer capable of multitasking and rendering media

- Must pay for your own high speed internet connection of one gig or higher



Compensation

Starting at $3 per hour with the possibility of higher pay depending on experience and skill level

Bonuses available for bringing in new clients or hitting performance goals



NOTE: There will be a 30 day paid trial period to ensure the position is a good fit for both sides.

title: Social Media & Paid Ads Specialist
description:
Location: Remote 

Company: Diversified Group with operations in Australia, China, and Hong Kong  

Industries: Professional Services, Agriculture & Manufacturing  

Job Type: Full-time, Permanent  

Salary: Competitive package commensurate with experience 



About Us  



We are a dynamic and diversified group running three distinct businesses across the Asia-Pacific region: 



- A Professional Accountancy & Advisory Firm with offices in Sydney, Shenzhen, and Hong Kong. 



- Strawberry Farms in Victoria and Queensland, Australia. 



- A Gadgets Manufacturing Facility in Huizhou, China.  



We are looking for a Social Media & Paid Ads Specialist to join our marketing team. The ideal candidate will help manage and grow our social media presence while supporting the execution and optimization of paid advertising campaigns, particularly on Meta platforms. 



This role focuses primarily on social media management and paid ads performance, while also supporting lead generation, audience engagement, and campaign monitoring. 



If you are interested in working with international brands, developing practical social media strategy skills, and contributing to measurable growth, we’d love to hear from you. 



Role & Responsibilities 



The responsibilities of this role are varied and involve both creative and analytical tasks. While experience in some areas is preferred, we are happy to provide training for the right candidate. 



Key responsibilities include: 



- Manage and grow social media channels of our brands across relevant platforms 

- Plan, create, and schedule social media content using content calendars 

- Develop, implement, and manage social media strategies 

- Monitor engagement, messages, and inquiries across social platforms 

- Actively participate in relevant online communities and groups to maintain engagement, build relationships, and support lead generation 

- Support lead generation through social media campaigns and
 outreach 

- Create and manage paid advertising campaigns, particularly on Meta 
 and Instagram) and LinkedIn 

- Write and optimize ad copy for social media campaigns 

- Monitor, track, and report on campaign performance 

- Provide insights and recommendations to improve campaign performance 

- Test and optimize ads, audiences, and creatives to improve results 

- Stay up to date with the latest social media trends, advertising strategies, and digital marketing tools 

- Collaborate with internal teams to ensure campaigns align with marketing goals 

- Ensure content is engaging, informative, and aligned with brand messaging 



Preferred Skills 

- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) 

- Strong interest in social media marketing and paid advertising 

- Basic understanding of Meta Ads Manager and other paid advertising platforms 

- Organized and able to manage multiple campaigns and content schedules 

- Analytical mindset with attention to performance metrics 

- A proactive attitude and willingness to learn 



Requirements: 



- 3+ years of experience in social media management, paid advertising, lead generation or digital marketing 

- Experience managing social media platforms such as
, Instagram, LinkedIn, or similar channels 

- Basic to intermediate experience with Meta Ads Manager and running paid social campaigns 

- Understanding of paid advertising fundamentals, including targeting, ad creatives, and campaign optimization 

- Ability to write engaging social media content and ad copy that drives engagement and conversions 

- Strong analytical skills with the ability to monitor campaign performance and identify optimization opportunities 

- Experience using marketing and analytics tools such as Meta Business Suite, scheduling tools, or basic analytics platforms 

- Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal 

- Organized and able to manage multiple campaigns, content schedules, and tasks simultaneously 

- Proactive, detail-oriented, and eager to learn new digital marketing tools and strategies 

- Experience engaging in online communities, groups, or forums to build relationships and maintain audience engagement is a plus 

- Experience working in a remote or distributed team environment is an advantage 

- Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field is preferred but not required 



What We Offer  



Diverse Challenge: Escape the monotony of a single industry. Apply your skills across three fascinating and different businesses. 



Professional Growth: This role reports directly to the Marketing Manager and offers significant scope for career advancement as the companies grow.  



Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere in the Philippines with a stable internet connection.  



Competitive Compensation: A salary package that rewards expertise and results, plus opportunities for performance-based bonuses.  



Supportive Environment: You will have the full backing of the ownership team and access to the resources needed to succeed. 



How to Apply 



Ready to build something exceptional? Please send your application with the subject line: "Application: Social Media Specialist - [Your Name]". Your application must include: 



- Your updated CV/Resume. 



- A cover letter that addresses: 1. Why you are interested in managing social media for three different businesses. 2. A brief example of a successful advertising campaign you have led (mention the channels and key results). 3. Your salary expectation. 



- (Optional but highly valued) Links to your portfolio, LinkedIn profile, or any relevant case studies. Applications without a cover letter will not be considered. We are an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity in our team.

title: Senior Video Editor
description:
???? Senior Video Editor (Performance Creative)



???? Performance Bonus — Up to $10,000



This is a performance-driven role, not a time-based one.



We value results more than hours worked — that’s why we offer large performance bonuses. High-performing editors can earn merit-based bonuses up to $10,000.



Bonuses are tied directly to:

1. Ads that perform and scale

2. Strong retention and thumb-stop rates

3. Consistent first-edit approvals

4. Ownership, speed, and reliability



Bonuses are not tied to seniority or time spent online.



If you think like a growth partner, understand how ads convert, and take ownership of outcomes — this role offers real upside, not capped potential.



?? Read This First — Who This Role Is For



Apply only if you are:

1. Hungry to grow fast

2. Serious about long-term skill and income growth

3. Someone who values performance over hours worked

4. Comfortable in a high-expectation, fast-moving environment





We are a performance marketing agency managing multiple e-commerce brands and have generated over USD $10,000,000 in total revenue.



Our growth is rapid.

Our standards are high.

Our ability to adapt quickly is critical.



This role is not for beginners.



That said — you will not be left alone.



We have senior-level strategists and operators who actively review work, give feedback, and help you grow into a top-tier performance editor.



If you want:

Stability without growth ? this is not the role

Comfort without accountability ? this is not the role



If you want to compound skills, income, and career trajectory — keep reading.



???? Overview

Your job is to turn winning scripts and concepts into performance-ready ads that hit hard within the first few seconds and convert on the back end.



You’re not just editing videos — you’re building ads that are made to scale.



This means:

- Hitting the hook fast

- Keeping the viewer engaged throughout

- Bringing product and outcome to life visually

- Matching the format to the platform (Meta, TikTok, YouTube)





Experience & Fit (Read Carefully)

This role is not suitable for junior editors, social media editors, or branding-only creatives.



1. Deep Understanding of Human Psychology (Required)

? You understand how viewers emotionally process ads, not just how to edit clips.

? You know how to use visual pacing, sequencing, and framing to guide emotion

? You can translate fear, relief, curiosity, urgency, desire, and trust into visuals

? You actively think about what the viewer feels second-by-second



2. 3–5+ Years in the E-commerce Editing Industry (Non-Negotiable)

? You have at least 3–5 years of experience in editing e-commerce ads.

? You’ve edited ads for products that sell online, not just content for views

? You understand funnels, presell logic, and why certain creatives scale



3. E-commerce Performance Editors Only

? Paid social ads (Meta, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

? UGC-style conversion creatives

? Performance-focused editing (hooks, retention, CTAs)



If your background is mainly:

? Music videos

? Corporate videos

? Brand films

? Long-form YouTube



???? This role is not a match.



4. English Proficiency (Required)

? Fluent or strong working proficiency in English

? Able to understand scripts without hand-holding

? Can match captions, overlays, and pacing to English VO naturally

? Sensitive to tone, urgency, and emotional nuance



???? What You Need to Be Good At

? Understanding what makes an ad convert — especially in the first 3–6 seconds

? Knowing how to pace, cut, and sequence to match the creative strategist’s script

? Being fast without sacrificing structure

? Turning raw content (UGC, testimonials, overlays) into clean ad flows

? Spotting when a visual slows the message and fixing it independently



???? KPIs

? Final ads delivered per week: 18–27 finished video ads (with variations)

? Hook variations delivered per week: Minimum 3 hook cuts from the same script

? Thumb-stop rate (0–3s retention): ? 30%

? Edit approval rate (1st version): ? 80?cepted without major changes

? Re-edit turnaround time: ? 24 hours

? Raw assets tagged and uploaded: 100% to Google Drive B-Roll folder



???? Daily Tasks

? Check for new scripts and concepts from Creative Strategist

? Review brief, script, and reference ads

? Request missing footage or raw files if needed

? Cut 2-3 CONCEPTs/day depending on complexity

? Use platform-first pacing (hook in first 0.5–1.5s)

? Add captions, overlays, and brand assets

? Save files in final output folder and update naming convention

?Upload all trimmed/raw B-roll used to shared Drive



???? Weekly Tasks

? Deliver 5–10 final edited concepts by Friday

? Build at least 5 hook variations per script

? Review ad performance with Creative Strategist

? Reverse-engineer top-performing videos

? Tag and organize raw content used in edits



???? Collaboration

? Align with Creative Strategist on angle and awareness level

? Stay updated on hook formats that are working

?Sync weekly with strategist and media buyer

? Propose improvements proactively



???? Non-Negotiables

? No unlabelled videos or dumped B-roll

? No edits launched without hook clarity

? You are not just editing — you are building a winning ad system

? Hit your weekly quota and own quality

? Stay curious and reverse-engineer winning Meta/TikTok ads

title: Reddit Growth Manager (SEO Agency)
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a Reddit Manager to lead organic community engagement and brand presence for our diverse client portfolio. You will be responsible for navigating Reddit's unique culture to build authority, drive traffic, and manage reputations without relying on traditional "corporate" marketing tactics.



Key Responsibilities

- Strategic Posting: Create and distribute value-first content across relevant subreddits to build organic reach for SEO clients.

- Community Engagement: Monitor threads and participate in discussions to position our clients as helpful industry experts.

- Account Management: Maintain multiple aged or niche-specific Reddit profiles while adhering to platform-wide and subreddit-specific rules.

- Trend Analysis: Identify emerging discussions or viral opportunities that align with our clients' target keywords and industries.

- Crisis & Reputation Management: Monitor brand mentions and address negative sentiment or misinformation professionally.



Qualifications

- Proven track record of growing accounts or driving traffic on Reddit.

- Deep understanding of "Reddiquette" and the specific nuances of different communities.

- Ability to switch writing styles to match various brand voices and subreddit personas.

- Basic understanding of SEO and how social signals/referral traffic impact search rankings.

- Excellent judgment in identifying which subreddits are open to brand participation versus those that are strictly anti-marketing.



How to Apply

Please send your resume and a brief summary of your Reddit experience. Include links to any communities you have managed or specific examples of successful organic posts you have executed.

title: A+ Social Media Manager
description:
Salon Marketing Solutions is an Australian-based marketing education company supporting beauty salons, skin clinics, and aesthetic businesses across Australia and New Zealand. We provide done-for-you campaigns, strategic mentoring, and practical tools to help clinic owners grow consistently and confidently.



Please ONLY apply if you have experience in the ff:
 Marketing, Meta Ads, Canva Pro, Meta Business Suite



Recruited and Trained by Vanessa McDonald Consulting – Installed™ Service

Installed™ builds in-house marketing capability for beauty and skin clinics.

This role is a 4–6 week training and placement pathway, preparing you to run the full social media marketing function inside a clinic — not as an agency, but as an embedded tea
mber.



Purpose:



To lead and execute a clinic’s social media marketing strategy, design, content, engagement, and paid ads — with the goal of growing visibility, followers, and lead lists. You will be placed with a growing clinic business (to be advised at the second interview) and work directly with the clinic owner following installation.

 marketing will be required on an ad-hoc basis to complement social strategy.

This is an incredible opportunity to learn directly from Vanessa McDonald — one of Australia’s most respected marketing strategists in the professional beauty and skincare industry, with 24 years of experience guiding clinics to build sustainable, high-performing marketing systems.



You’ll be trained in:



The beauty, skin, and aesthetics industry — treatments, terminology, and client psychology.

The specific clinic’s business, brand, and product range.

 marketing systems used within the industry, including Phorest or Shortcuts (training provided for these only if the clinic you are placed with uses these particular platforms).



Core Responsibilities:



- Develop and implement Instagram and
 strategies that drive engagement, growth, and qualified new client leads.

- Manage Meta Ads end-to-end: strategy, creative, setup, optimisation, and reporting.

- Confidently operate within the Meta Business Suite and Ads Manager, keeping up to date with current Meta tools and best practices.

- Design high-quality, on-brand content in Canva Pro, following the clinic’s brand style guide.

- Create and edit reels and short-form videos using apps such as CapCut or similar.

- Write fluent, polished UK English captions and campaign copy that reflect the clinic’s tone of voice.

- Manage DMs and engagement daily — responding to enquiries, nurturing prospective clients, and connecting with local influencers and aligned businesses for collaboration opportunities.

- Build and send
 campaigns using Mailchimp or the clinic’s in-house marketing system (Mailchimp expertise is essential).

- Utilise AI tools to enhance efficiency while preserving human judgment and creative quality.

- Prepare concise monthly reports covering organic performance, ads, and
 activity.

- Once Installed, you’ll work directly with the clinic owner using a clear communication and project management system that sets expectations, deadlines, and approvals.



Required Experience & Skills



- Minimum 3 years’ proven experience in social media strategy and Meta Ads management.

- Demonstrated results in organic audience growth and engagement.

- Strong proficiency with Meta Business Suite, Ads Manager, data analysis, and reporting.

- Advanced Canva Pro design capability with excellent attention to detail. We’re seeking candidates who can create clean, professional artwork and design aligned to brand standards.

- Confident in photo editing and basic retouching to ensure all visual content is polished, consistent, and on-brand.

- Skilled in reel creation and short-form video editing (CapCut preferred).

- Expert in Mailchimp, including automation, segmentation, and reporting.

- Adaptable to other industry platforms such as Phorest or Shortcuts (training provided for these systems only).

- Familiar with ManyChat or similar tools for automated lead capture.

- Excellent written and spoken UK English for an Australian audience (10/10 fluency).

- Reliable, responsive, and professional in remote settings.

- Must successfully complete a test task before onboarding.



Work Structure & Conditions

Part-time: 20 hours per week (remote, flexible)

Training rate: $175 AUD/week (6-8 weeks)

Probation (3 months): $200 AUD/week

After 12 months: $240 AUD/week

12months +: 280AUD per week

Performance bonuses apply for meeting or exceeding campaign KPIs and results benchmarks.

If you prefer full-time work, you may be placed with two clinics instead of one.

All recruitment, training, and placement are managed through Vanessa McDonald Consulting – Installed™.



Only applicants who will fill out the form below will be screened:

title: Remote Pharmaceutical Sales Representative (Native English)
description:

This is a fully remote, international contractor position. We are looking for experienced sales professionals globally who have excellent English proficiency and the ability to work during US business hours.

Location: 100% Remote (Global)

Schedule: Full-time availability required

Market: B2B US Market (Wellness clinics, med spas, healthcare providers)

Key Responsibilities

Conduct outbound B2B sales calls to US-based wellness clinics and medical practices.

Manage the full sales cycle from cold outreach to pipeline management.

Represent a portfolio of high-demand products including Compounded Medications (503A/503B), GLP-1s, Peptides, and Hormone Therapies.

Sales Experience: Proven experience in cold calling and B2B sales is required. Background in pharma, med spa, or wellness sales is a strong plus.

Why Join Us?

Work with a dynamic US-based consultancy firm.

Sell high-ticket, high-demand medical products.

Receive structured onboarding and ongoing sales support.

title: Full Stack Developer – Bring Vibe-Coded Prototypes to Life

Join a fast-moving creative entrepreneur building apps that actually matter—fitness trackers, educational games for kids, dating apps that don't suck, book publishing tools, and more. I vibe code the prototypes and vision, you bring the polish, performance, and production-ready magic.

Let's build something amazing together!

title: Teaming Partner Outreach Specialist (Federal Government Contracting)
description:
Teaming Partner Outreach Specialist (Federal Government Contracting)



Part-Time (Transition to Full-Time)

Organic District Commercial Services

Washington, DC (Remote within U.S. – EST Business Hours)



About Organic District Commercial Services:

Organic District Commercial Services is a prime federal government contractor headquartered in Washington, DC, specializing in facility management, building services, and commercial operations support for U.S. government agencies nationwide.



Our business model is centered on strategically sourcing services and products on behalf of federal agencies by identifying, qualifying, and assembling trusted subcontractors, suppliers, manufacturers, and service providers to meet mission-critical requirements. We operate as a compliant contracting partner that aligns government procurement needs with capable industry partners, ensuring responsiveness, accountability, and performance.



We take pride in connecting small businesses with federal contracting opportunities while supporting government agencies in the execution of their respective missions. Through disciplined sourcing, clear communication of requirements, and reliable partner coordination, Organic District Commercial Services helps federal customers achieve operational success while strengthening the small-business industrial base.



Position Overview:

The Teaming Partner Outreach Specialist will support federal government contracting efforts by identifying, qualifying, and engaging subcontractors, suppliers, manufacturers, and service providers to obtain pricing, quotes, capability and past performance information in support of government RFQs, Sources Sought, and solicitations.



This role is ideal for a professional who understands federal acquisition processes, is comfortable with high-volume phone and
 outreach, and can clearly communicate Scopes of Work (SOWs) and solicitation requirements to industry teaming partners.



This position will begin as part-time and transition to full-time for the right candidate.



Key Responsibilities:

-Source, research, and identify qualified subcontractors, suppliers, and teaming partners for federal procurements. 

-Conduct daily outreach via phone and
 to request:

       *Pricing and quotes.

       *Lead times and availability.

       *Compliance confirmations.

-Clearly communicate government Scopes of Work, technical requirements, and solicitation instructions to potential teaming partners.

-Support rapid-turn sourcing for RFQs with short response windows.

-Track outreach activity, responses, and follow-ups using CRM and internal tracking tools.

-Coordinate closely with proposal and operations teams to meet submission deadlines.

-Maintain professional relationships with vendors across the facility maintenance and management industry.



Required Qualifications:

-Demonstrated experience with federal government contracting, subcontractor sourcing, or supplier outreach.

-Strong understanding of RFQs, SOWs, and federal procurement terminology.

-Experience conducting high-volume outbound calls and professional
 outreach.

-Sales, business development, or vendor-relations background.

-Knowledge of the Facility Maintenance & Management industry (janitorial, HVAC, electrical, general maintenance, grounds, facilities services, etc.)

-Excellent verbal and written English communication skills.

-Ability to work U.S. Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours.



Preferred Qualifications:

-Experience using 
 for sourcing and solicitation review

-Familiarity with HubSpot CRM or similar CRM platforms

-Experience supporting prime contractors on federal proposals or RFQs

-Understanding of compliance considerations (insurance, certifications, small-business status, etc.)

-Work Schedule & Compensation Structure.



Work Schedule & Compensation Structure:

-Part-Time to Start

-Average of four (4) continuous working hours per day

-Five (5) days per week

-Weekly Pay Range

     *$100 – $200 USD per week, based on performance, responsiveness, and sourcing effectiveness

-Performance-Based Bonuses:

     *Bonus eligibility for securing 2–3 qualified subcontractor and/or supplier quotes per RFQ

-Quotes must include pricing and SOW-aligned capability confirmation.

-Bonus applies when all required quotes and capability information are delivered within one (1) business day of RFQ issuance



Opportunity to transition to full-time based on performance, consistency, and business needs.





What Success Looks Like:

-Fast, accurate sourcing of compliant subcontractors and suppliers.

-Clear communication of government requirements to industry partners.

-Reliable delivery of competitive quotes within tight federal timelines.

-Professional representation of Organic District Commercial Services to the vendor community.



Why Join Organic District Commercial Services:

You’ll be joining a growing federal facility management contractor with a strong reputation for execution, professionalism, and responsiveness. We value initiative, accountability, and professionals who take pride in supporting government missions while expanding opportunities for small businesses.



We are grateful in advance for the next superstar who will help strengthen our teaming network and contribute directly to winning and executing federal work.

You will be working with warm and interested leads across cold

, and your job is to continue the conversation and push them toward booking a call. Some campaigns will also require phone follow-up with prospects who have already shown interest.

This is a sales role.

Replying to interested leads by



Following up with warm prospects



Booking calls for sales teams



Calling prospects who have already shown interest

Helping turn replies into booked appointments



Why This Role Is Attractive:



Remote work



Hourly pay



Commission opportunities



Warm lead follow-up, not just random cold calling all day



Ongoing work for strong performers



Opportunity to grow with our team



Performance-based upside



Pay:



$4 USD per hour



Commission / bonus opportunities for booked calls on selected campaigns



Additional earning potential for strong performers



Paid remote role with real upside for the right person



Who We’re Looking For:



Strong spoken and written English



Sales experience is a big advantage



Cold calling experience is a strong advantage



Comfortable on the phone



Good at writing natural, persuasive messages



Fast, reliable, and organised



Motivated by performance and making money



Comfortable working remotely with a stable internet connection



This Role Is Best For Someone Who:



Likes sales



Likes speaking to prospects



Wants a remote role with upside



Is confident following up by both
 and phone



Wants consistent work and room to grow



How To Apply:

To apply, complete this Google Form:

What sales experience you have



Why you want a remote role working with cold
 and sales

Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

title: Compliance Coordinator
description:
At The Guiding Star LLC, we are seeking a detail-oriented Real Estate Compliance Coordinator who excels at bringing clarity and organization to complex processes while ensuring everything runs smoothly and efficiently. If you take pride in accuracy, accountability, and maintaining well-structured operations, this is a great opportunity to join a team where your expertise can make a meaningful impact.



Key Responsibilities:

Document Review & Management

Review contracts, agreements, and internal forms for accuracy and compliance

Maintain a well-organized system for tracking and filing documents across

platforms



Compliance Monitoring

Monitor processes to ensure alignment with internal policies and external

regulations

Identify potential areas of risk and help implement solutions



Audit Support

Prepare and organize documentation for internal and external audits

Assist in executing post-audit follow-up and corrective actions



Policy Communication & Implementation

Support rollout of company policies and ensure team-wide understanding

Communicate updates and compliance expectations effectively



Recordkeeping & Reporting

Maintain detailed records of compliance reports and regulatory communications

Generate summaries and compliance reports for leadership and department leads

Highlight gaps, trends, or risks that require attention



Cross-Department Collaboration

Work with HR, Legal, Operations, and other departments to align on policy and

process documentation

Provide guidance and clarification on compliance-related matters



Minimum technical requirements:

Processor (CPU): Intel Core i5 (10th gen or newer) or AMD Ryzen 5 (3000 series or newer)

RAM: 8 GB minimum (16 GB recommended)

Storage: 256 GB SSD (minimum)

Operating System: Windows 10/11 (Pro or Home) or macOS

Webcam & Microphone: 720p HD webcam and external microphone or headset with noise cancellation for clear communication



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Legal Studies, Finance, or related field

3–5 years of real estate experience in compliance, legal, or administrative roles

High attention to detail, accuracy, and a process-driven mindset

Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain complex topics clearly

Excellent time-management and organizational skills

Experience in real estate compliance and familiarity with industry documentation is a must

Strong sense of integrity and professionalism when handling confidential information



Preferred (But Not Required):

Experience using compliance tracking tools or document management software

Certifications in compliance, auditing, or legal administration



Benefits:

Competitive Salary Range: PHP 25,000–40,000, commensurate with experience and qualifications

Internet allowance

Paid Time Off, Emergency / Sick Leave

Health insurance coverage or reimbursement

Remote-first, growth-oriented company culture

Opportunities for advancement and skill development

Collaborative, people-focused team environment





We do NOT accept applications via this platform.

Please apply using our official form:




/forms/f701a6013de445de4bcdd8963ce9d83e?r=apse2

(Only takes a few minutes!)

We look forward to reviewing your application!

title: Entry-Level Video Editor
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented entry-level video editor to support our growing video production workflow.

This is a great opportunity for someone with 1–2 years of editing experience who wants to improve their skills in a structured production environment while working on professional client content.



Types of Videos You’ll Edit

You’ll work on projects such as:

• Corporate brand videos

 • Testimonial and campaign content

 • Podcast episodes (multi-camera editing)

 • Short-form social media content

 • Authority-building content for business owners



Requirements

• 1–2 years of video editing experience

 • Strong attention to detail

 • Ability to follow structured workflows and editing guidelines

 • Reliable communication and professionalism



Technical Requirements

• Must have experience using Adobe Premiere Pro

 • Some After Effects experience is a plus

 • This role is not suited for CapCut-only editors, as our workflow is built in Premiere Pro

 • Experience using Dropbox and 
 is a plus



Hardware & Internet Requirements

• A video editing computer capable of editing and exporting long footage

 • At least 50gbps internet speed

 • Large storage availability for handling video assets and project files



Workflow Expectations

Our team values quality and clean systems. Editors are expected to:

• Follow structured file naming and folder organization

 • Meet agreed-upon deadlines

 • Communicate clearly and proactively

 • Maintain consistent turnaround times



Training & Support

We provide in-house training and guidance to help editors adapt to our workflow and editing standards.



Long-Term Opportunity

This role starts as a part-time position (10–20 hours per week) under a 3-month contract with $4-6 hourly rate.

Our goal is to build a long-term working relationship with someone who wants to grow with us in the content production space. As the brand grows, hours and responsibilities can increase.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

• Links to 1–2 corporate or brand video edits

 • Links to 1–2 long-form podcast edits

 • Links to 1–2 short-form reels

 • Your hourly rate

 • How many hours per week you can consistently commit

Please include the word “Authority” in the first line of your message so we know you read the full job description.

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
Role Description

This is a full-time remote role for a Customer Support Specialist. The individual in this role will be responsible for responding to customer inquiries, providing assistance, resolving customer issues, and ensuring a high level of customer satisfaction.

Day-to-day tasks include troubleshooting, answering
s and chat messages across Meta, Shopee, and TikTok, documenting customer interactions, and ensuring timely follow-ups to maintain customer trust. The role also involves handling order-related requests such as address changes, cancellations, product inquiries, and order updates, as well as escalating complex issues when necessary.

In addition to customer support, the role will involve reporting and administrative responsibilities, including maintaining organized records of customer inquiries, preparing monthly customer support reports, and helping identify recurring issues to improve the overall customer experience.

Administrative tasks will also include inventory tracking, expense reporting, and order reconciliation to ensure accurate records across sales channels and internal systems.





Qualifications

Proven ability in Customer Support, with strong skills in ensuring Customer Satisfaction and relationship management.

Exceptional Interpersonal Skills for effective communication and interaction with diverse customers.

Experience in diagnosing and resolving issues through effective Technical Support.

Strong Analytical Skills to assess customer concerns and recommend solutions effectively.

Ability to work independently in a remote environment, manage time effectively, and prioritize tasks.

Bachelor’s degree or equivalent professional experience, preferably in customer service, business, or a related field.





Benefits:



Fully Remote: Work From Home 



9am - 6pm Monday to Friday (Philippine Hours)
