title: Luxury Hotel Operations Director (Remote)
description:
Luxury Hotel Operations Director (Remote)

Location: Remote — Philippines

Job Type: Full-Time

Schedule: Flexible with regular overlap with UK hours

Reports To: Founder / Senior Leadership Team



About the Role

We are looking for a highly experienced luxury hospitality operations leader to bring the thinking, discipline, and standards of a serious hotel group into our growing premium accommodation business.



This is a senior remote role for someone who has already operated at a high level within luxury hotels, resorts, or multi-property hospitality businesses. You will act as a strategic and operational leader from afar — strengthening standards, guest experience, commercial thinking, service delivery, team accountability, and operational robustness across the business.



This is not a role about being friendly and presentable. It is about structure, consistency, anticipation, recovery, and commercial awareness.



What You'll Be Responsible For

Guest Experience & Service Standards

- Elevate the guest journey across enquiry, booking, pre-arrival, in-stay, and post-stay touchpoints

- Set the standard for premium, warm, polished, and consistent guest communication

- Review feedback and complaints to identify trends and drive improvement

- Strengthen service recovery so issues are handled with confidence and professionalism



Operational Systems & Accountability

- Design and refine SOPs, playbooks, checklists, escalation paths, and reporting rhythms

- Bring structure to handovers, issue tracking, guest readiness, and team routines

- Identify weak points and recurring failures, then drive meaningful improvements

- Help the business shift from reactive problem-solving to consistent operational discipline



Revenue, Pricing & Availability

- Support leadership with pricing, availability, occupancy, and commercial strategy

- Bring a sharper lens to booking pace, gap management, stay restrictions, and sell-out periods

- Advise on how operational decisions and guest experience impact conversion and profitability



Food, Beverage & Ancillary Revenue

- Support development of premium extras, in-stay experiences, and F&B-style offers

- Help shape packages and add-ons that are both commercially smart and operationally deliverable

- Ensure ancillary offers feel integrated into the guest experience, not bolted on



Commercial Coordination

- Join up guest experience, operations, sales, marketing, and commercial performance

- Act as a senior thought partner to the Founder and Leadership Team

- Help the business function as one connected hospitality operation



Who We're Looking For

You are likely coming from a role such as:

- Group Director of Operations

- Regional Director of Operations

- Cluster or Multi-Property General Manager

- Director of Hotel Operations

- Senior Revenue or Commercial Operations Leader with strong operational breadth



You will bring:

- Significant experience in luxury hotels, premium resorts, or high-end hospitality groups

- Experience overseeing multiple properties, departments, or senior managers

- Strong understanding of guest experience, service standards, and operational systems

- Commercial instinct including exposure to pricing, availability, and revenue performance

- Experience influencing food and beverage, guest offers, or ancillary revenue

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Strong judgement, leadership maturity, and the ability to raise standards remotely

 - Confidence operating in a founder-led, fast-paced environment



This Role Is Not For You If...

- Your experience is only at single-property level with limited leadership breadth

- You have not led senior managers or multiple departments

- You are not commercially confident

- You prefer execution-only roles rather than strategic operational leadership

- You would find regular overlap with UK hours difficult



Working Pattern

This is a fully remote role based in the Philippines. We are not asking for full UK hours, but the role does require:

- Reliable overlap with UK leadership and operational teams

- Attendance at key meetings

- Responsiveness during agreed hours

- Flexibility for priorities, launches, or time-sensitive problem-solving



What Success Looks Like

- Guest communication becomes warmer, sharper, and more consistently premium

- Operational standards are clearer and more consistently executed

- Managers are more accountable and better led

- Complaints are handled more effectively

- Pricing and availability decisions are more commercially confident

- Ancillary offers are better structured and better sold

- The business feels less improvised and more like a high-performing premium hospitality operation



Why Join Us

This is a chance to play a genuinely senior role in a distinctive premium hospitality business with real ambition and room to grow. You will have visibility, influence, and the ability to help build something more robust and commercially sharp. We are looking for someone whose experience can raise the level of the entire operation.

title: We’re Hiring: E-Commerce Bookkeeping Specialist (Remote)
description:
We’re Hiring: E-Commerce Bookkeeping Specialist (Remote) 



We’re looking for a detail-oriented Bookkeeping Specialist to join our growing team! If you have experience in e-commerce, fulfillment, and shipping transactions, we want to hear from you.



Role Overview:

You will be responsible for managing and recording all company financial transactions, ensuring accuracy across our e-commerce operations.



 Key Responsibilities:

Handle daily bookkeeping and financial records

Track and reconcile e-commerce sales (Shopify or similar platforms)

Manage fulfillment and shipping costs (COD, logistics, returns, etc.)

Monitor and record all company transactions (expenses, revenue, payouts)

Prepare financial reports and summaries

Ensure accuracy and compliance in all financial data

? Requirements:

Proven experience in bookkeeping for e-commerce businesses

Familiarity with fulfillment, logistics, and shipping processes

Strong understanding of financial tools (QuickBooks, Xero, or similar)

High attention to detail and organization

Ability to work remotely and communicate effectively

title: Ecommerce Growth Manager (Shopify & Meta Ads)
description:
I help Shopify brands find winning products, launch high-converting creatives, and scale Meta ads profitably.



I have hands-on experience managing the full e-commerce workflow — from product research and validation to ad testing, optimization, and scaling. I understand how to identify winning angles, improve CTR, lower CPA, and push campaigns toward profitability.



I’m not just task-focused — I think in terms of performance and results. I analyze data daily, adjust creatives based on what’s converting, and understand how to structure campaigns for consistent growth.



What I can help you with:



Product research and identifying winning products



Shopify store setup and optimization (PDP, offers, bundles)



Meta Ads 
/Instagram) campaign setup and scaling



Creative strategy (angles, hooks, testing variations)



Improving CTR, CPC, CPA, and overall ROAS



Competitor and market research



Basic funnel optimization and conversion improvements



I’m fluent in English and communicate clearly and professionally. I can work independently, follow data, and make decisions that improve performance.



If you're looking for someone who understands how e-commerce actually works — not just a VA to complete tasks — I can help grow your store.

title: Paid Ads Lead Generation Specialist
description:
Paid Ads Lead Generation Specialist



Full-Time | Remote



Social Boost Agency is looking for an experienced Paid Ads Lead Generation Specialist to join our growing team.



We work with businesses that rely on high-quality leads and booked appointments, and we are seeking someone who knows how to build, optimize, and scale paid ad campaigns that consistently convert. This role is ideal for a data-driven professional with experience in lead generation campaigns and confidence managing paid traffic across Meta Ads and Google Ads.



Responsibilities



Set up and launch lead generation campaigns on
/Meta Ads and Google Ads



Create, test, and optimize campaign structures, audiences, and creatives



Track leads, conversions, and overall campaign performance



Optimize campaigns to reduce cost per lead (CPL) and improve ROI



Conduct A/B tests on ads, audiences, and landing pages



Scale successful campaigns while pausing underperforming ones



Manage lead tracking and pipelines using GoHighLevel or similar CRM tools



Provide regular performance updates and actionable insights



Requirements



2+ years of experience running Meta Ads or Google Ads



Proven experience with lead generation campaigns (not just eCommerce)



Strong understanding of conversion tracking and attribution



Experience with A/B testing creatives, audiences, and funnels



Ability to analyze campaign data and optimize performance



Familiarity with CRM systems and lead tracking



Preferred / Bonus Skills



Experience generating leads for local businesses or service-based companies



Knowledge of landing page or funnel optimization



Experience managing larger ad budgets



Understanding of marketing automation and follow-up systems



Experience using GoHighLevel is highly preferred



What We’re Looking For



Strategic thinker with a focus on lead generation funnels



Results-driven and data-focused



Takes ownership of campaign performance



Able to work independently while collaborating with the team



To Apply



Please include:



A brief summary of your paid ads experience



Examples of lead generation campaigns you’ve managed (industry, budget, CPL, results)



Experience using GoHighLevel or similar CRM platforms



Note: Applications without concrete campaign examples or results may not be considered.



Thank you and good luck!
